# 2026-01-17 20:17:00Z

<!-- VS Code Copilot IDE Session 4d62e5ad-bbc1-4f20-ac73-5b749d28e58d (2026-01-17 20:17:00Z) -->

_**User (2026-01-17 20:17:00Z)**_

We are close to finishing, but we need a few final changes and fixes across BOTH:
A) The Editor/Simulator app
B) The Stationeers mod runtime

IMPORTANT PROCESS OVERRIDE:
• Do NOT commit, push, or open PRs to GitHub.
• Do NOT stop for approval checkpoints.
• Ignore any “conductor” or “multi-step approval” instructions you normally follow.
• Just implement all changes locally in the working code and report what you changed.

IMPORTANT: Do not claim fixes unless you actually implemented them.
For each item below, list the files changed and give concrete steps to verify.

────────────────────────────────────────────
CORE REFACTOR REQUIRED: OPERATIONAL DETAILS + FLAT STRUCTURE
────────────────────────────────────────────

We have an issue with “Operational Details” and “Flat Structure”:

- The “Flat Structure” button totally breaks formatting and the nested boxes look broken.
- If I do NOT click “Flat Structure”, it wraps everything in “Operational Details” and I cannot change the name.
- Operational Details must NOT be a special wrapper across devices/guides/everything.

REQUIREMENT:
Operational Details is simply the DEFAULT wrapper for an added category.
It must behave like a normal category:
- renameable
- addable (more categories)
- reorderable
- not hard-coded

We must completely remove the “flat structure” concept and refactor the editor + mod to use this new schema universally.

NEW SCHEMA (apply to devices, guides, mechanics, everything):
- Image (NEW: editable; choose/add an image using the game’s PNGs in the AssetRipper folder)
- Title
- Page Description (prepend/append description like it is now)
Then inside the page, we need these options:
- Add Nested Section (operates like operational details nesting does now)
- Add In-Line Header (like vanilla guides: header with text paragraphs directly underneath)

So:
Nested Section = collapsible/nested boxes  
In-Line Header = non-collapsible header + paragraphs, placed between nested sections

After this refactor:
- device pages should still support the same nesting behavior
- but Operational Details can be renamed or replaced
- and additional categories can be added

────────────────────────────────────────────
FINAL FEATURE REQUESTS + BUG FIXES
────────────────────────────────────────────

1) Remove “Flat Structure” button
- It is broken and should not exist in the new schema.

2) Add new categories to devices AND guides
- Provide UI to add categories.
- Ensure the mod can read and render these categories from JSON.

3) Add in-line headers between nested sections (with paragraph text)
Example desired layout:
Title name  
Page Description  
description text  
Power Basics >  
  description text  
IN-LINE HEADING HERE  
Description text blah blah blah  
Solar Panels >

4) Global tooltips editing
- Rename the “Tooltips” button to “Global Tooltips”.
- Right now it shows all tooltips but when I click one I cannot edit it.
- I want global tooltips editable from that screen.
- Device-specific tooltips can remain editable within device pages.

────────────────────────────────────────────
EDITOR FORMATTING / LAYOUT FIXES (REQUIRED)
────────────────────────────────────────────

These are not cosmetic; they affect usability.

A) Rich text toolbar placement
- The rich text formatting toolbar MUST be positioned ABOVE the text box it controls.
- It should be clearly associated with the active text field.
- It must not overlap content or appear detached from the editor.

B) Section properties panel layout
- Section/category properties must scale properly with window resizing.
- Properties panels must NOT overlap the content editor or other UI panels.
- Ensure proper flex / layout constraints so resizing or popping panels out does not cause overlap.

Acceptance:
- Toolbar is always above the text area.
- No overlapping UI when resizing panes or windows.
- Layout remains usable at different window sizes.

────────────────────────────────────────────
MOD RUNTIME FIXES
────────────────────────────────────────────

5) Guides button color
- Our guide buttons are wrong (green/dark blue).
- Vanilla guides use a light blue.
- Find what color the game actually uses and match it. Do not guess.

6) “Vanilla guides” font mismatch
- The “Vanilla Guides” text is not the same font as “Guides”.
- Make them match.

7) Tooltips when paused
- Bug: if you press pause, tooltips don’t show.
- Fix so tooltips still show while paused.

8) Survival manual placement
- “Stationeers survival manual” should only appear on the survival manual page,
  NOT as a button on the guides page.

9) Doubled section titles after flattening change
- Since flattening was introduced, titles are doubled in the editor.
- Example: top shows “Part 1: …” then it repeats below in the nested.
- The top-level wrapper is redundant.
- The editor should only show what we see in-game.
- Remove redundant nodes and put the delete/add subsection buttons on the correct node.

────────────────────────────────────────────
VERIFY / NO HALLUCINATIONS
────────────────────────────────────────────

For each item:
- List files changed
- Explain what was wrong
- Explain what you changed
- Provide steps to verify (in editor, preview, and in-game where relevant)

Some of these issues have persisted through multiple prompts.
Double check they are actually fixed before you say they are fixed.


---

I see! The vanilla code calls `SetSpecial()` for important (guide) buttons which changes the sprite. But then we're overriding the color with our custom color after calling `SetNormal()`. We're using the wrong color.

The issue is:
1. Vanilla guides use `SetSpecial()` to use a light blue sprite
2. Our custom guides use `SetNormal()` then set a color override

Since the game uses sprites (not colors) for button styling, we should NOT override BackImage.color. Let me fix this:

- newString:

```
/**
 * TooltipEditor - Main tooltip editing panel
 * Shows list of tooltips, search, category filter, add/delete/edit operations
 */
import React, { useCallback, useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useTooltipStore } from '@renderer/store/tooltipStore';
import type { TooltipDefinition } from '@models/tooltipModel';
import { getSortedCategories } from '@models/tooltipModel';

interface TooltipEditorProps {
  onSelectTooltip?: (tooltip: TooltipDefinition | null) => void;
  onUpdateTooltip?: (tooltip: TooltipDefinition) => void;
}

export const TooltipEditor: React.FC<TooltipEditorProps> = ({
  onSelectTooltip,
  onUpdateTooltip,
}) => {
  const {
    collection,
    selectedTooltipKey,
    selectedTooltip,
    searchQuery,
    selectedCategory,
    filteredTooltips,
    selectTooltip,
    setSearchQuery,
    setSelectedCategory,
    addNewTooltip,
    updateTooltipContent,
    deleteTooltip,
  } = useTooltipStore();

  const [showAddDialog, setShowAddDialog] = useState(false);
  const [newKey, setNewKey] = useState('');
  const [newDescription, setNewDescription] = useState('');
  const [editingKey, setEditingKey] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [editingDescription, setEditingDescription] = useState('');

  const categories = getSortedCategories(collection);

  // When editing key changes, load the description
  useEffect(() => {
    if (editingKey) {
      const tooltip = collection.tooltips.get(editingKey);
      setEditingDescription(tooltip?.description || '');
    }
  }, [editingKey, collection.tooltips]);

  const handleSelectTooltip = useCallback(
    (tooltip: TooltipDefinition) => {
      selectTooltip(tooltip.key);
      onSelectTooltip?.(tooltip);
      // Start editing when clicked
      setEditingKey(tooltip.key);
      setEditingDescription(tooltip.description);
    },
    [selectTooltip, onSelectTooltip]
  );

  const handleAddNew = useCallback(() => {
    if (newKey.trim()) {
      addNewTooltip(newKey, newDescription);
      const added = collection.tooltips.get(newKey);
      if (added) {
        handleSelectTooltip(added);
        onUpdateTooltip?.(added);
      }
      setNewKey('');
      setNewDescription('');
      setShowAddDialog(false);
    }
  }, [newKey, newDescription, addNewTooltip, collection.tooltips, handleSelectTooltip, onUpdateTooltip]);

  const handleDelete = useCallback(
    (key: string) => {
      if (confirm(`Delete tooltip "${key}"?`)) {
        deleteTooltip(key);
        selectTooltip(null);
        onSelectTooltip?.(null);
        setEditingKey(null);
      }
    },
    [deleteTooltip, selectTooltip, onSelectTooltip]
  );

  const handleSaveEdit = useCallback(() => {
    if (editingKey && editingDescription !== undefined) {
      updateTooltipContent(editingKey, editingDescription);
      const updated = collection.tooltips.get(editingKey);
      if (updated) {
        onUpdateTooltip?.({ ...updated, description: editingDescription });
      }
    }
  }, [editingKey, editingDescription, updateTooltipContent, collection.tooltips, onUpdateTooltip]);

  const handleCancelEdit = useCallback(() => {
    setEditingKey(null);
    setEditingDescription('');
  }, []);

  return (
    <div className="flex flex-col h-full bg-gray-950">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="border-b border-gray-700 p-4 bg-gray-900">
        <h2 className="text-lg font-bold text-white mb-4">Global Tooltips</h2>
```

- oldString:

```
/**
 * TooltipEditor - Main tooltip editing panel
 * Shows list of tooltips, search, category filter, add/delete operations
 */
import React, { useCallback, useState } from 'react';
import { useTooltipStore } from '@renderer/store/tooltipStore';
import type { TooltipDefinition } from '@models/tooltipModel';
import { getSortedCategories } from '@models/tooltipModel';

interface TooltipEditorProps {
  onSelectTooltip?: (tooltip: TooltipDefinition | null) => void;
  onUpdateTooltip?: (tooltip: TooltipDefinition) => void;
}

export const TooltipEditor: React.FC<TooltipEditorProps> = ({
  onSelectTooltip,
  onUpdateTooltip,
}) => {
  const {
    collection,
    selectedTooltipKey,
    selectedTooltip,
    searchQuery,
    selectedCategory,
    filteredTooltips,
    selectTooltip,
    setSearchQuery,
    setSelectedCategory,
    addNewTooltip,
    updateTooltipContent,
    deleteTooltip,
  } = useTooltipStore();

  const [showAddDialog, setShowAddDialog] = useState(false);
  const [newKey, setNewKey] = useState('');
  const [newDescription, setNewDescription] = useState('');

  const categories = getSortedCategories(collection);

  const handleSelectTooltip = useCallback(
    (tooltip: TooltipDefinition) => {
      selectTooltip(tooltip.key);
      onSelectTooltip?.(tooltip);
    },
    [selectTooltip, onSelectTooltip]
  );

  const handleAddNew = useCallback(() => {
    if (newKey.trim()) {
      addNewTooltip(newKey, newDescription);
      const added = collection.tooltips.get(newKey);
      if (added) {
        handleSelectTooltip(added);
        onUpdateTooltip?.(added);
      }
      setNewKey('');
      setNewDescription('');
      setShowAddDialog(false);
    }
  }, [newKey, newDescription, addNewTooltip, collection.tooltips, handleSelectTooltip, onUpdateTooltip]);

  const handleDelete = useCallback(
    (key: string) => {
      if (confirm(`Delete tooltip "${key}"?`)) {
        deleteTooltip(key);
        selectTooltip(null);
        onSelectTooltip?.(null);
      }
    },
    [deleteTooltip, selectTooltip, onSelectTooltip]
  );

  const handleUpdateDescription = useCallback(
    (tooltip: TooltipDefinition) => {
      updateTooltipContent(tooltip.key, tooltip.description);
      onUpdateTooltip?.(tooltip);
    },
    [updateTooltipContent, onUpdateTooltip]
  );

  return (
    <div className="flex flex-col h-full bg-gray-950">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="border-b border-gray-700 p-4 bg-gray-900">
        <h2 className="text-lg font-bold text-white mb-4">Tooltips</h2>
```

      {/* List of tooltips */}
      <div className="flex-1 overflow-auto">

          <div className="p-4 text-center text-gray-500">
            <p>No tooltips found</p>
          </div>
        ) : (

                className={`transition-colors ${
                  selectedTooltipKey === tooltip.key
                    ? 'bg-cyan-900 border-l-2 border-cyan-600'
                    : 'bg-gray-900 hover:bg-gray-800 border-l-2 border-transparent'
                }`}
              >

                    <div className="font-mono text-sm text-cyan-400 mb-2">{tooltip.key}</div>
                    {tooltip.category && (
                      <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-2">{tooltip.category}</div>

                      onChange={(e) => setEditingDescription(e.target.value)}
                      className="w-full px-3 py-2 rounded bg-gray-800 border border-cyan-600 text-white text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-cyan-500"
                      rows={4}
                      autoFocus
                      placeholder="Enter tooltip description..."
                    />
                    <div className="flex gap-2 mt-2 justify-end">
                      <button
                        onClick={handleCancelEdit}
                        className="px-3 py-1 rounded text-xs font-medium bg-gray-700 text-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-600 transition-colors"
                      >
                        Cancel
                      </button>
                      <button
                        onClick={handleSaveEdit}
                        className="px-3 py-1 rounded text-xs font-medium bg-cyan-600 text-white hover:bg-cyan-500 transition-colors"
                      >
                        Save
                      </button>
                      <button
                        onClick={(e) => {
                          e.stopPropagation();
                          handleDelete(tooltip.key);
                        }}
                        className="px-3 py-1 rounded text-xs font-medium bg-red-900 text-red-200 hover:bg-red-800 transition-colors"
                      >
                        Delete
                      </button>
                    </div>
                  </div>

                    onClick={() => handleSelectTooltip(tooltip)}
                    className="p-3 cursor-pointer"
                  >
                    <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-2">
                      <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                        <div className="font-mono text-sm text-white truncate">{tooltip.key}</div>
                        {tooltip.category && (
                          <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">{tooltip.category}</div>
                        )}
                        <div className="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-1 line-clamp-2">
                          {tooltip.description || '(click to edit)'}
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      <span className="text-xs text-gray-500 flex-shrink-0">✏️ Edit</span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

    <div className="flex flex-col h-full bg-stationpedia-bg">

          {/* Text Formatting */}
          <button
            onClick={() => insertTMPTag('b')}
            disabled={!selection}
            className="px-2 py-1 text-xs bg-stationpedia-surface hover:bg-gray-700 rounded text-gray-300 disabled:opacity-50 font-bold"
            title="Bold: <b>text</b>"
          >
            B
          </button>
          <button
            onClick={() => insertTMPTag('i')}
            disabled={!selection}

            title="Italic: <i>text</i>"
          >
            I
          </button>
          <button
            onClick={() => insertTMPTag('u')}
            disabled={!selection}
            className="px-2 py-1 text-xs bg-stationpedia-surface hover:bg-gray-700 rounded text-gray-300 disabled:opacity-50 underline"
            title="Underline: <u>text</u>"
          >
            U
          </button>
          <button
            onClick={() => insertTMPTag('s')}
            disabled={!selection}
            className="px-2 py-1 text-xs bg-stationpedia-surface hover:bg-gray-700 rounded text-gray-300 disabled:opacity-50 line-through"
            title="Strikethrough: <s>text</s>"
          >
            S
          </button>
          
          <div className="w-px h-6 bg-stationpedia-border mx-1" />
          
          {/* Colors */}
          <button

            title="Orange: <color=#FF7A18>text</color>"
          >
            🟠
          </button>
          <button
            onClick={() => insertColorTag('#00FF00')}
            disabled={!selection}
            className="px-2 py-1 text-xs bg-stationpedia-surface hover:bg-gray-700 rounded disabled:opacity-50"
            style={{ color: '#00FF00' }}
            title="Green: <color=#00FF00>text</color>"
          >
            🟢
          </button>
          <button
            onClick={() => insertColorTag('#FF0000')}
            disabled={!selection}
            className="px-2 py-1 text-xs bg-stationpedia-surface hover:bg-gray-700 rounded disabled:opacity-50"
            style={{ color: '#FF0000' }}
            title="Red: <color=#FF0000>text</color>"
          >
            🔴
          </button>
          <button
            onClick={() => insertColorTag('#FFFF00')}
            disabled={!selection}
            className="px-2 py-1 text-xs bg-stationpedia-surface hover:bg-gray-700 rounded disabled:opacity-50"
            style={{ color: '#FFFF00' }}
            title="Yellow: <color=#FFFF00>text</color>"
          >
            🟡
          </button>
          <button
            onClick={() => insertColorTag('#00FFFF')}
            disabled={!selection}
            className="px-2 py-1 text-xs bg-stationpedia-surface hover:bg-gray-700 rounded disabled:opacity-50"
            style={{ color: '#00FFFF' }}
            title="Cyan: <color=#00FFFF>text</color>"
          >
            🔵
          </button>
          
          <div className="w-px h-6 bg-stationpedia-border mx-1" />
          
          {/* Size */}
          <button
            onClick={() => insertSizeTag('150%')}
            disabled={!selection}
            className="px-2 py-1 text-xs bg-stationpedia-surface hover:bg-gray-700 rounded text-gray-300 disabled:opacity-50"
            title="Large text: <size=150%>text</size>"
          >
            A+
          </button>
          <button
            onClick={() => insertSizeTag('75%')}
            disabled={!selection}
            className="px-2 py-1 text-xs bg-stationpedia-surface hover:bg-gray-700 rounded text-gray-300 disabled:opacity-50 text-[10px]"
            title="Small text: <size=75%>text</size>"
          >
            A-
          </button>
          
          <div className="w-px h-6 bg-stationpedia-border mx-1" />
          
          {/* Lists & Structure */}
          <button
            onClick={() => insertBulletList()}
            disabled={!selection}
            className="px-2 py-1 text-xs bg-stationpedia-surface hover:bg-gray-700 rounded text-gray-300 disabled:opacity-50"
            title="Bullet list"
          >
            • List
          </button>
          <button
            onClick={() => insertNumberedList()}
            disabled={!selection}
            className="px-2 py-1 text-xs bg-stationpedia-surface hover:bg-gray-700 rounded text-gray-300 disabled:opacity-50"
            title="Numbered list"
          >
            1. List
          </button>
          
          <div className="w-px h-6 bg-stationpedia-border mx-1" />
          
          {/* Links & Headers */}
          <button
            onClick={() => insertLink()}
            disabled={!selection}
            className="px-2 py-1 text-xs bg-stationpedia-surface hover:bg-gray-700 rounded text-gray-300 disabled:opacity-50"
            title="Link to page: {LINK:PageKey;DisplayText}"
          >
            🔗 Link
          </button>
          <button
            onClick={() => insertHeader()}
            disabled={!selection}
            className="px-2 py-1 text-xs bg-orange-600 hover:bg-orange-700 rounded text-white disabled:opacity-50"
            title="Insert In-Line Header: {HEADER:Text}"
          >
            📋 In-Line Header
          </button>
          <button
            onClick={() => insertText('\n')}
            disabled={!selection}
            className="px-2 py-1 text-xs bg-stationpedia-surface hover:bg-gray-700 rounded text-gray-300 disabled:opacity-50"
            title="New line"
          >
            ↵
          </button>
        </div>
        
        {/* Textarea - flex-1 to fill remaining space */}
        <textarea
          ref={editorRef}
          value={currentValue}
          onChange={(e) => handleEditorChange(e.target.value)}
          disabled={!selection}
          placeholder={selection ? 'Enter text...' : 'Click a field below to edit'}
          className="flex-1 w-full px-3 py-2 bg-stationpedia-surface border border-stationpedia-border rounded text-sm text-white placeholder-gray-500 focus:outline-none focus:border-stationpedia-accent focus:ring-1 focus:ring-stationpedia-accent resize-none disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed font-mono"
        />
        
        {/* Properties Panel - shown when operational detail is selected */}
        {selection?.type === 'operationalDetail' && (() => {
          const detail = getDetailAtPath(device.operationalDetails!, selection.path);
          if (!detail) return null;
          
          return (
            <div className="section-properties-panel mt-2 flex-shrink-0">
              <div className="section-properties-header">📋 Section Properties</div>
              <div className="section-properties-grid">
                {/* Collapsible checkbox */}
                <label className="section-property-checkbox-label">
                  <input
                    type="checkbox"
                    checked={detail.collapsible || false}
                    onChange={(e) => updateDetailProperty(selection.path, 'collapsible', e.target.checked)}
                    className="section-property-checkbox"
                  />
                  📁 Collapsible
                </label>
                
                {/* TOC ID input */}
                <div className="section-property-row">
                  <span className="section-property-label">🔗 TOC ID:</span>
                  <input
                    type="text"
                    value={detail.tocId || ''}
                    onChange={(e) => updateDetailProperty(selection.path, 'tocId', e.target.value)}
                    placeholder="optional"
                    className="section-property-input"
                  />
                </div>
                
                {/* Image file input */}
                <div className="section-property-row section-property-full-width">
                  <span className="section-property-label">🖼️ Image:</span>
                  <input
                    type="text"
                    value={detail.imageFile || ''}
                    onChange={(e) => updateDetailProperty(selection.path, 'imageFile', e.target.value)}
                    placeholder="image-filename.png"
                    className="section-property-input"
                  />
                </div>
                
                {/* YouTube URL input */}
                <div className="section-property-row section-property-full-width">
                  <span className="section-property-label">📺 YouTube:</span>
                  <input
                    type="text"
                    value={detail.youtubeUrl || ''}
                    onChange={(e) => updateDetailProperty(selection.path, 'youtubeUrl', e.target.value)}
                    placeholder="Video ID"
                    className="section-property-input"
                  />
                </div>
                
                {/* YouTube Label input */}
                {detail.youtubeUrl && (
                  <div className="section-property-row section-property-full-width">
                    <span className="section-property-label">Label:</span>
                    <input
                      type="text"
                      value={detail.youtubeLabel || ''}
                      onChange={(e) => updateDetailProperty(selection.path, 'youtubeLabel', e.target.value)}
                      placeholder="Video title"
                      className="section-property-input"
                    />
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
          );
        })()}
      </div>

        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">

              onClick={() => setSelection(null)}
              className="text-xs text-gray-400 hover:text-white"
            >
              ✕ Clear

          )}

                    stationpedia.LoreGuideContents);

                if (button == null) return;

                // Mark this button as a custom guide (not vanilla) so it won't be wrapped
                button.gameObject.name = $"CustomGuide_{guide.guideKey}";

                // Set button text
                button.Apply(guide.displayName ?? guide.guideKey);

                // Set up click handler
                var guideKey = guide.guideKey; // Capture for closure
                if (button.InsertsButton != null)
                {
                    button.InsertsButton.onClick.RemoveAllListeners();
                    button.InsertsButton.onClick.AddListener(() =>
                    {
                        stationpedia.SetPage(guideKey, true);
                    });
                }

                // Use SetSpecial() to match vanilla guide button styling (light blue)
                // This uses the SpecialButton sprite which is the same as vanilla guides
                button.SetSpecial();

                // Set the icon image to ImportantSearchImage (star icon) like vanilla guides
                if (button.InsertImage != null && stationpedia.ImportantSearchImage != null)
                {
                    button.InsertImage.sprite = stationpedia.ImportantSearchImage;
                    button.InsertImage.gameObject.SetActive(true);
                }

                // Position at top
                button.transform.SetAsFirstSibling();

                    stationpedia.LoreGuideContents);

                if (button == null) return;

                button.gameObject.name = $"CustomGuide_{guide.guideKey}";

                // Set button text
                button.Apply(guide.displayName ?? guide.guideKey);

                // Set up click handler
                var guideKey = guide.guideKey; // Capture for closure
                if (button.InsertsButton != null)
                {
                    button.InsertsButton.onClick.RemoveAllListeners();
                    button.InsertsButton.onClick.AddListener(() =>
                    {
                        stationpedia.SetPage(guideKey, true);
                    });
                }

                // Set to normal state (not special) for proper button coloring
                button.SetNormal();

                // Apply button color to the BackImage (the button background)
                if (button.BackImage != null)
                {
                    var targetColor = Data.JsonGuideLoader.GetButtonColor(guide);
                    button.BackImage.color = targetColor;
                }

                // Set the icon image to ImportantSearchImage (star icon) like vanilla guides
                if (button.InsertImage != null && stationpedia.ImportantSearchImage != null)
                {
                    button.InsertImage.sprite = stationpedia.ImportantSearchImage;
                    button.InsertImage.gameObject.SetActive(true);
                }

                // Position at top
                button.transform.SetAsFirstSibling();

```
        private static void AddVanillaGuidesHeader(Stationpedia stationpedia)
        {
            try
            {
                if (stationpedia == null || stationpedia.LoreGuideContents == null)
                {
                    return;
                }

                var loreContainer = stationpedia.LoreGuideContents;
                
                // Check if header already exists
                foreach (Transform child in loreContainer)
                {
                    if (child.gameObject.name == "VanillaGuidesHeader")
                    {
                        return; // Already has header
                    }
                }
                
                // Count custom guide buttons to know where to place the header
                int customGuideCount = 0;
                for (int i = 0; i < loreContainer.childCount; i++)
                {
                    var child = loreContainer.GetChild(i);
                    if (child.gameObject.name.StartsWith("CustomGuide_"))
                    {
                        customGuideCount++;
                    }
                }
                
                // If there are vanilla guides (not just our custom ones), add a header
                int vanillaCount = loreContainer.childCount - customGuideCount;
                if (vanillaCount > 0)
                {
                    // Create header using a new GameObject with TextMeshProUGUI
                    var headerObj = new GameObject("VanillaGuidesHeader");
                    headerObj.transform.SetParent(loreContainer, false);
                    
                    // Add RectTransform for layout
                    var rectTransform = headerObj.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
                    rectTransform.sizeDelta = new Vector2(0, 40);
                    
                    // Add LayoutElement to control sizing
                    var layoutElement = headerObj.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.LayoutElement>();
                    layoutElement.preferredHeight = 40;
                    layoutElement.flexibleWidth = 1;
                    
                    // Add TextMeshPro text component - use same font as LoreGuideTitle for consistency
                    var textComponent = headerObj.AddComponent<TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI>();
                    textComponent.text = "Vanilla Guides";
                    
                    // Copy font settings from LoreGuideTitle to match exactly
                    if (stationpedia.LoreGuideTitle != null)
                    {
                        textComponent.font = stationpedia.LoreGuideTitle.font;
                        textComponent.fontSharedMaterial = stationpedia.LoreGuideTitle.fontSharedMaterial;
                        textComponent.fontSize = stationpedia.LoreGuideTitle.fontSize;
                        textComponent.fontStyle = stationpedia.LoreGuideTitle.fontStyle;
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        textComponent.fontSize = 32;
                        textComponent.fontStyle = TMPro.FontStyles.Normal;
                    }
                    
                    textComponent.alignment = TMPro.TextAlignmentOptions.Center;
                    textComponent.color = new Color(1f, 1f, 1f, 1f); // White to match "Guides" title
                    
                    // Position the header after custom guides
                    headerObj.transform.SetSiblingIndex(customGuideCount);
                    
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Added Vanilla Guides header (Custom: {customGuideCount}, Vanilla: {vanillaCount})");
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Error adding vanilla guides header: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }
```

- oldString:

```
        private static void AddVanillaGuidesHeader(Stationpedia stationpedia)
        {
            try
            {
                if (stationpedia == null || stationpedia.LoreGuideContents == null)
                {
                    return;
                }

                var loreContainer = stationpedia.LoreGuideContents;
                
                // Check if header already exists
                foreach (Transform child in loreContainer)
                {
                    if (child.gameObject.name == "VanillaGuidesHeader")
                    {
                        return; // Already has header
                    }
                }
                
                // Count custom guide buttons to know where to place the header
                int customGuideCount = 0;
                for (int i = 0; i < loreContainer.childCount; i++)
                {
                    var child = loreContainer.GetChild(i);
                    if (child.gameObject.name.StartsWith("CustomGuide_"))
                    {
                        customGuideCount++;
                    }
                }
                
                // If there are vanilla guides (not just our custom ones), add a header
                int vanillaCount = loreContainer.childCount - customGuideCount;
                if (vanillaCount > 0)
                {
                    // Create header using a new GameObject with TextMeshProUGUI
                    var headerObj = new GameObject("VanillaGuidesHeader");
                    headerObj.transform.SetParent(loreContainer, false);
                    
                    // Add RectTransform for layout
                    var rectTransform = headerObj.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
                    rectTransform.sizeDelta = new Vector2(0, 40);
                    
                    // Add LayoutElement to control sizing
                    var layoutElement = headerObj.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.LayoutElement>();
                    layoutElement.preferredHeight = 40;
                    layoutElement.flexibleWidth = 1;
                    
                    // Add TextMeshPro text component
                    var textComponent = headerObj.AddComponent<TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI>();
                    textComponent.text = "Vanilla Guides";
                    textComponent.fontSize = 32;
                    textComponent.alignment = TMPro.TextAlignmentOptions.Center;
                    textComponent.color = new Color(1f, 1f, 1f, 1f); // White to match "Guides" title
                    textComponent.fontStyle = TMPro.FontStyles.Normal; // Not bold to match Guides header
                    
                    // Position the header after custom guides
                    headerObj.transform.SetSiblingIndex(customGuideCount);
                    
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Added Vanilla Guides header (Custom: {customGuideCount}, Vanilla: {vanillaCount})");
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Error adding vanilla guides header: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        private IEnumerator ShowTooltipAfterDelay()
        {
            // Use WaitForSecondsRealtime so tooltips work when game is paused (Time.timeScale = 0)
            yield return new WaitForSecondsRealtime(HOVER_DELAY);
            
            if (_isHovering)
            {
                string tooltipText = GetTooltipText();
                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(tooltipText))
                {
                    StationpediaAscendedMod.CurrentTooltipText = tooltipText;
                    StationpediaAscendedMod.ShowTooltip = true;
                }
            }
        }
```

```
/* Section Properties Panel */
.section-properties-panel {
  margin-top: 8px;
  padding: 10px 12px;
  background-color: #0A1F3A; /* Dark blue background */
  border: 1px solid var(--stationpedia-border);
  border-radius: 4px;
  max-height: 180px;
  overflow-y: auto;
}

.section-properties-header {
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--stationpedia-accent);
  margin-bottom: 10px;
  padding-bottom: 4px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--stationpedia-border);
}

.section-properties-grid {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 10px 16px;
  align-items: center;
}

.section-property-checkbox-label {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
  font-size: 12px;
  color: #ffffff;
  cursor: pointer;
  min-width: 100px;
}

.section-property-checkbox {
  width: 16px;
  height: 16px;
  cursor: pointer;
  accent-color: var(--stationpedia-accent);
  background-color: #0A1F3A;
}

.section-property-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  flex: 1;
  min-width: 180px;
}

.section-property-full-width {
  flex-basis: 100%;
  min-width: 100%;
}

.section-property-label {
  font-size: 12px;
  color: #ffffff;
  white-space: nowrap;
  min-width: 60px;
}

.section-property-input {
  flex: 1;
  min-width: 100px;
  padding: 6px 10px;
  font-size: 12px;
  background-color: #0A1F3A; /* Dark blue background */
  border: 1px solid var(--stationpedia-border);
  border-radius: 4px;
  color: #ffffff; /* White text */
  transition: all 0.2s ease;
}

.section-property-input::placeholder {
  color: #6E7681;
}

.section-property-input:hover {
  border-color: rgba(255, 122, 24, 0.5);
}

.section-property-input:focus {
  outline: none;
  border-color: var(--stationpedia-accent);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.2);
}
```

- oldString:

```
/* Section Properties Panel */
.section-properties-panel {
  margin-top: 8px;
  padding: 10px;
  background-color: #0A1F3A; /* Dark blue background */
  border: 1px solid var(--stationpedia-border);
  border-radius: 4px;
}

.section-properties-header {
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--stationpedia-accent);
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.section-properties-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 8px;
}

.section-property-checkbox-label {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
  font-size: 11px;
  color: #ffffff;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.section-property-checkbox {
  width: 14px;
  height: 14px;
  cursor: pointer;
  accent-color: var(--stationpedia-accent);
  background-color: #0A1F3A;
}

.section-property-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
}

.section-property-full-width {
  grid-column: span 2;
}

.section-property-label {
  font-size: 11px;
  color: #ffffff;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.section-property-input {
  flex: 1;
  padding: 4px 8px;
  font-size: 11px;
  background-color: #0A1F3A; /* Dark blue background */
  border: 1px solid var(--stationpedia-border);
  border-radius: 3px;
  color: #ffffff; /* White text */
  transition: all 0.2s ease;
}

.section-property-input::placeholder {
  color: #6E7681;
}

.section-property-input:hover {
  border-color: rgba(255, 122, 24, 0.5);
}

.section-property-input:focus {
  outline: none;
  border-color: var(--stationpedia-accent);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(255, 122, 24, 0.2);
}
```

_**User (2026-01-17 20:39:06Z)**_

We have some serious issues with the editor now:
1. I cannot edit the section titles, or section descriptions right now in the editor. 
2. The section properties/device editor part of the editor needs to be scrollable when it gets overlapped...currently if I resize it I am limited in resizing it to its exact size.
3. The "in Line header" button is fine up in the rich text editor. That is not what I asked for though. We already had that button, i thhink you just renamed it. What I want is down in the guide sections part of the editor to be able to add an in line header in between sections where I can just have text below the header. So instead of a nested section it'll be an inline flat section with a header and text below it. Then I can make the guides any way I want. Right now its all broken. 
4. New sections being made have orange text for some reason. It should just be white unless we are in stationeers ascended mode but the mod side should read the json and make that happen.

[map[explanation:Update SectionHeader to accept onTitleClick for editing title filePath:c:\Dev\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\StationpediaEditor\src\renderer\editor\DeviceSectionsEditor.tsx newString:// Section header component
const SectionHeader: React.FC<{
  title: string;
  isExpanded: boolean;
  onToggle: () => void;
  onTitleClick?: () => void; // For editing the title
  onAdd?: () => void;
  addLabel?: string;
  onAddInlineHeader?: () => void; // For adding inline headers
  showDelete?: boolean;
  onDelete?: () => void;
  isSelected?: boolean;
}> = ({ title, isExpanded, onToggle, onTitleClick, onAdd, addLabel, onAddInlineHeader, showDelete, onDelete, isSelected }) => (
  <div className={`flex items-center justify-between py-2 px-3 bg-stationpedia-surface/80 rounded-t border ${isSelected ? 'border-stationpedia-accent bg-stationpedia-accent/20' : 'border-stationpedia-border'}`}>
    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
      <button
        onClick={onToggle}
        className="text-xs text-gray-400 hover:text-white p-1"
        title={isExpanded ? 'Collapse' : 'Expand'}
      >
        {isExpanded ? '▼' : '▶'}
      </button>
      {onTitleClick ? (
        <span
          onClick={onTitleClick}
          className={`font-semibold cursor-pointer hover:bg-stationpedia-accent/30 px-2 py-1 rounded ${isSelected ? 'text-white bg-stationpedia-accent/30' : 'text-gray-200'}`}
          title="Click to edit title"
        >
          {title}
        </span>
      ) : (
        <span className="font-semibold text-gray-200">{title}</span>
      )}
    </div>
    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
      {onAddInlineHeader && (
        <button
          onClick={(e) => {
            e.stopPropagation();
            onAddInlineHeader();
          }}
          className="px-2 py-1 bg-yellow-600 hover:bg-yellow-700 text-white rounded text-xs transition-colors"
          title="Add an inline header (flat section with title + description)"
        >
          📋 + Header
        </button>
      )}
      {showDelete && onDelete && (
        <button
          onClick={(e) => {
            e.stopPropagation();
            if (confirm(`Delete section "${title}"?`)) {
              onDelete();
            }
          }}
          className="px-2 py-1 bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700 text-white rounded text-xs transition-colors"
          title="Delete this section"
        >
          🗑️ Delete
        </button>
      )}
      {onAdd && (
        <button
          onClick={onAdd}
          className="px-2 py-1 bg-stationpedia-accent hover:bg-stationpedia-accent-hover text-white rounded text-xs transition-colors"
        >
          {addLabel || '+ Add'}
        </button>
      )}
    </div>
  </div>
); oldString:// Section header component
const SectionHeader: React.FC<{
  title: string;
  isExpanded: boolean;
  onToggle: () => void;
  onAdd?: () => void;
  addLabel?: string;
  showDelete?: boolean;
  onDelete?: () => void;
}> = ({ title, isExpanded, onToggle, onAdd, addLabel, showDelete, onDelete }) => (
  <div className="flex items-center justify-between py-2 px-3 bg-stationpedia-surface/80 rounded-t border border-stationpedia-border">
    <button
      onClick={onToggle}
      className="flex items-center gap-2 text-stationpedia-accent font-semibold hover:text-stationpedia-accent-hover"
    >
      <span className="text-xs">{isExpanded ? '▼' : '▶'}</span>
      {title}
    </button>
    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
      {showDelete && onDelete && (
        <button
          onClick={(e) => {
            e.stopPropagation();
            if (confirm(`Delete section "${title}"?`)) {
              onDelete();
            }
          }}
          className="px-2 py-1 bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700 text-white rounded text-xs transition-colors"
          title="Delete this section"
        >
          🗑️ Delete
        </button>
      )}
      {onAdd && (
        <button
          onClick={onAdd}
          className="px-2 py-1 bg-stationpedia-accent hover:bg-stationpedia-accent-hover text-white rounded text-xs transition-colors"
        >
          {addLabel || '+ Add'}
        </button>
      )}
    </div>
  </div>
);] map[explanation:Fix the title color in SortableDetailItem from cyan accent to white/gray filePath:c:\Dev\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\StationpediaEditor\src\renderer\editor\DeviceSectionsEditor.tsx newString:          {/* Title - clickable to edit (hidden when hideTitle=true) */}
          {!hideTitle && (
            <div
              onClick={(e) => {
                e.stopPropagation();
                onSelect(path, 'title');
              }}
              className={`font-semibold cursor-pointer hover:bg-stationpedia-accent/20 px-2 py-1 rounded ${
                isThisSelected && selectedField === 'title'
                  ? 'bg-stationpedia-accent/30 text-white'
                  : 'text-gray-200'
              }`}
            >
              {detail.title || '(untitled)'}

- newString:

```
  // Add operational detail
  const addOperationalDetail = (parentPath?: number[]) => {
    if (!device) return;
    
    const newDetails = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(device.operationalDetails || []));
    const newDetail: OperationalDetail = { title: 'New Section', description: '' };
    
    if (parentPath && parentPath.length > 0) {
      let parent = newDetails[parentPath[0]];
      for (let i = 1; i < parentPath.length; i++) {
        parent = parent.children[parentPath[i]];
      }
      parent.children = [...(parent.children || []), newDetail];
    } else {
      newDetails.push(newDetail);
    }
    
    onUpdateDevice({ operationalDetails: newDetails });
  };

  // Add inline header (flat section with just title + description, no children)
  const addInlineHeader = (afterPath?: number[]) => {
    if (!device) return;
    
    const newDetails = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(device.operationalDetails || []));
    const inlineHeader: OperationalDetail = { 
      title: 'New Header', 
      description: '',
      collapsible: false // Inline headers are not collapsible
    };
    
    if (afterPath && afterPath.length > 0) {
      // Insert as a sibling after the specified path
      if (afterPath.length === 1) {
        // Top level - insert after this index
        newDetails.splice(afterPath[0] + 1, 0, inlineHeader);
      } else {
        // Nested - add as child of parent
        let parent = newDetails[afterPath[0]];
        for (let i = 1; i < afterPath.length - 1; i++) {
          parent = parent.children[afterPath[i]];
        }
        parent.children = [...(parent.children || []), inlineHeader];
      }
    } else {
      // Add at end
      newDetails.push(inlineHeader);
    }
    
    onUpdateDevice({ operationalDetails: newDetails });
  };
```

- oldString:

The user has identified several issues with the editor:

1. Cannot edit section titles or descriptions - This is likely related to my changes where I added `hideTitle` which is hiding the title, but now they can't click on it to edit. I need to make sure the title is still editable even if hidden visually, or provide another way to edit it.

2. Section properties panel needs to be scrollable and resizable - The editor height is limited. Need to make it properly scrollable.

3. In-Line Header button - The user wants to be able to add a new type of section in the guide tree that is an "inline header" - basically a flat section with just a header and description text, not a nested/collapsible section. This is different from the `{HEADER:}` tag in rich text.

4. New sections have orange text - Need to check where the orange color is coming from in the section display.

Let me investigate these issues:

1. For the title editing issue - I added `hideTitle={true}` which hides the title div entirely, so users can't click it to edit. I need to either:
   - Remove hideTitle and find another way to avoid doubled titles
   - Or make the SectionHeader title itself clickable to edit the title
   - Or show a "Edit Title" button in the section header

2. For scrollability - Need to check the CSS and make sure the properties panel can scroll.

3. For inline headers in guide sections - Need to add a new button/feature to add an "inline header" type section that doesn't have children, just title + description.

4. For orange text - Looking at the SortableDetailItem, the title has `text-stationpedia-accent` which is cyan/blue, not orange. Let me check where orange might come from.

_**User (2026-01-17 20:43:37Z)**_

Also Air conditioning guide still has the top level nest {operational detials". I don't want that to be the top level anymore. I want everything to test in the exact same way as operational details, just one hierarchy level up. _**Agent (copilot/claude-opus-4.5)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Looking at your screenshots, I understand the issues:

1. **JSON Guides still wrap everything in "Operational Details"** - You want sections to be at the TOP level, not nested inside an "Operational Details" wrapper
2. **The `{HEADER:...}` format** is showing as raw text instead of being rendered properly
3. **Section titles are orange** in-game when they should follow the standard styling

Let me find and fix the mod code that renders JSON guides: 

Let me look at the Patches.cs code that renders JSON guides - specifically the `RenderJsonGuidePage` function: 

I see! The code checks for `guide.flatStructure` to decide whether to use flat rendering. Let me check what `flatStructure` is and see if it's being set correctly: 

I see! The `flatStructure` property controls whether to use the flat rendering. Let me check if the JSON guides have `flatStructure` set, and also I need to see the `Models.cs` where this is defined: 

I see that `flatStructure` defaults to `false`. The user's issue is that even their JSON guides are getting wrapped in "Operational Details". 

Looking at the code flow:
1. `RenderJsonGuidePage` checks `guide.flatStructure`
2. If `true`, it calls `RenderFlatGuidePage` (no wrapper)
3. If `false`, it calls `CreateOperationalDetailsCategory` (with wrapper)

The user wants **all JSON guides to default to flat structure** (no "Operational Details" wrapper). Let me change the default to `true` and also update the rendering logic: 

Now let me check the `{HEADER:...}` issue. The user is seeing raw `{HEADER:Test Of In Line Headers}` text in the description. This should be parsed and rendered as a header. Let me look at the text processing code: 

The `CreateTextElement` function DOES process `{HEADER:...}` tags - it converts them to `<b><color=#FF7A18>{headerText}</color></b>`. The issue is that this processing might not be happening when the guide sections render.

Let me look at the `CreateFlatGuideSection` function that renders guide content:

I want you to rewrite it so that nothing anywhere in the mod or editor gets wrapped in "operational details". That was how we built it in the past and it is old functionality that hsould be rewritten so we can create that schema from scratch in any way shape or form we want. 

I want it to LOOK THE SAME in the sense that there are nested sections etc. but I want to be able to create as many as I want in that schema with whatever title and however many sections I want etc. 

Right now it all gets wrapped in operational details. There should be no flat=true setting becaues I don't want that binary in our mod. I want it all to be one unifiied editing system between devices, guides, game mechanics. THE ONLY CAVEAT is that the devices that already have operational details should mostly stay the same. That information and format is fine, but it needs to be updated to the new unified system. So those don't change in practice but the ability to edit them changes.

        /// Render a JSON-defined guide page - sections appear directly without wrapper
        /// </summary>
        private static void RenderJsonGuidePage(UniversalPage page, Transform contentTransform, string guideKey)
        {
            try
            {
                var stationpedia = Stationpedia.Instance;
                if (stationpedia == null) return;

                var categoryPrefab = stationpedia.CategoryPrefab;
                if (categoryPrefab == null) return;

                // Get the guide data
                var guide = Data.JsonGuideLoader.GetGuide(guideKey);
                if (guide == null)
                {
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Guide not found: {guideKey}");
                    return;
                }

                // Convert to DeviceDescriptions for rendering
                var guideData = Data.JsonGuideLoader.ToDeviceDescriptions(guide);
                if (guideData?.operationalDetails == null || guideData.operationalDetails.Count == 0)
                {
                    // If no sections, just show the page description
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Guide {guideKey} has no sections");
                    return;
                }

                // Render sections directly without "Operational Details" wrapper
                RenderGuideSections(page, contentTransform, guideData, guide.generateToc, guide.tocTitle);
                
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Rendered JSON guide: {guideKey}");
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Error rendering JSON guide {guideKey}: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Render the Daylight Sensor Guide page - sections appear directly without wrapper
        /// </summary>
        private static void RenderDaylightSensorGuidePage(UniversalPage page, Transform contentTransform)
        {
            try
            {
                var stationpedia = Stationpedia.Instance;
                if (stationpedia == null) return;

                var categoryPrefab = stationpedia.CategoryPrefab;
                if (categoryPrefab == null) return;

                var sourceText = page.PageDescription;
                if (sourceText == null) return;

                // Get the guide data
                var guideData = Data.DaylightSensorGuideLoader.GetDaylightSensorGuideDescriptions();
                if (guideData?.operationalDetails == null || guideData.operationalDetails.Count == 0)
                {
                    ConsoleWindow.Print("[Stationpedia Ascended] No Daylight Sensor Guide data found");
                    return;
                }

                // Render sections directly without wrapper
                RenderGuideSections(page, contentTransform, guideData, guideData.generateToc, guideData.tocTitle);
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Error rendering Daylight Sensor Guide: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        /// Render a JSON-defined guide page using operational details
        /// </summary>
        private static void RenderJsonGuidePage(UniversalPage page, Transform contentTransform, string guideKey)
        {
            try
            {
                var stationpedia = Stationpedia.Instance;
                if (stationpedia == null) return;

                var categoryPrefab = stationpedia.CategoryPrefab;
                if (categoryPrefab == null) return;

                // Get the guide data
                var guide = Data.JsonGuideLoader.GetGuide(guideKey);
                if (guide == null)
                {
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Guide not found: {guideKey}");
                    return;
                }

                // Convert to DeviceDescriptions for rendering
                var guideData = Data.JsonGuideLoader.ToDeviceDescriptions(guide);
                if (guideData?.operationalDetails == null || guideData.operationalDetails.Count == 0)
                {
                    // If no operational details, just show the page description
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Guide {guideKey} has no operational details");
                    return;
                }

                // Check if this guide uses flat structure
                if (guide.flatStructure)
                {
                    // Render sections directly without Operational Details wrapper
                    RenderFlatGuidePage(page, contentTransform, guideData);
                }
                else
                {
                    // Use the standard CreateOperationalDetailsCategory to render the guide
                    CreateOperationalDetailsCategory(page, contentTransform, guideData);
                }
                
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Rendered JSON guide: {guideKey} (flat={guide.flatStructure})");
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Error rendering JSON guide {guideKey}: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

```
        /// Render guide/mechanic sections directly - unified rendering for all guide types
        /// </summary>
        private static void RenderGuideSections(UniversalPage page, Transform contentTransform, DeviceDescriptions guideData, bool generateToc = false, string tocTitle = null)
        {
            try
            {
                var stationpedia = Stationpedia.Instance;
                if (stationpedia == null) return;

                var categoryPrefab = stationpedia.CategoryPrefab;
                if (categoryPrefab == null) return;

                var sourceText = page.PageDescription;
                if (sourceText == null) return;

                // Clear any existing content
                var existingContent = contentTransform.Find("GuideSectionsContent");
                if (existingContent != null)
                {
                    UnityEngine.Object.DestroyImmediate(existingContent.gameObject);
                }

                // Create container
                var containerGO = new GameObject("GuideSectionsContent");
                containerGO.transform.SetParent(contentTransform, false);
                containerGO.transform.SetSiblingIndex(20);

                var containerRT = containerGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
                containerRT.anchorMin = new Vector2(0, 1);
                containerRT.anchorMax = new Vector2(1, 1);
                containerRT.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 1);

                var containerLayout = containerGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.VerticalLayoutGroup>();
                containerLayout.spacing = 10;
                containerLayout.childForceExpandWidth = true;
                containerLayout.childForceExpandHeight = false;
                containerLayout.childControlWidth = true;
                containerLayout.childControlHeight = true;

                var containerFitter = containerGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter>();
                containerFitter.horizontalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.Unconstrained;
                containerFitter.verticalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;

                // Generate Table of Contents if enabled
                if (generateToc && guideData.operationalDetails != null && guideData.operationalDetails.Count > 0)
                {
                    CreateGuideToc(containerRT, guideData.operationalDetails, sourceText, tocTitle ?? "Contents");
                }

                // Render each section directly as a collapsible category
                foreach (var sectionDetail in guideData.operationalDetails)
                {
                    CreateGuideSection(containerRT, sectionDetail, categoryPrefab, sourceText, page);
                }

                // Force layout rebuild
                if (stationpedia.ContentRectTransform != null)
                {
                    UnityEngine.UI.LayoutRebuilder.ForceRebuildLayoutImmediate(stationpedia.ContentRectTransform);
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Error rendering guide sections: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Create a Table of Contents panel for guide sections
        /// </summary>
        private static void CreateGuideToc(RectTransform parent, List<OperationalDetail> sections, TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI sourceText, string title)
        {
            try
            {
                // Create TOC container
                var tocGO = new GameObject("GuideTOC");
                tocGO.transform.SetParent(parent, false);
                
                var tocRT = tocGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
                tocRT.anchorMin = new Vector2(0, 1);
                tocRT.anchorMax = new Vector2(1, 1);
                tocRT.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 1);
                
                // Background
                var tocBg = tocGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.Image>();
                tocBg.color = new Color(0.05f, 0.1f, 0.15f, 0.8f);
                
                // Layout
                var tocLayout = tocGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.VerticalLayoutGroup>();
                tocLayout.padding = new RectOffset(10, 10, 10, 10);
                tocLayout.spacing = 5;
                tocLayout.childForceExpandWidth = true;
                tocLayout.childForceExpandHeight = false;
                tocLayout.childControlWidth = true;
                tocLayout.childControlHeight = true;
                
                var tocFitter = tocGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter>();
                tocFitter.horizontalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.Unconstrained;
                tocFitter.verticalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;
                
                // Title
                var titleGO = new GameObject("TOCTitle");
                titleGO.transform.SetParent(tocGO.transform, false);
                
                var titleText = titleGO.AddComponent<TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI>();
                titleText.font = sourceText.font;
                titleText.fontSharedMaterial = sourceText.fontSharedMaterial;
                titleText.fontSize = sourceText.fontSize + 2;
                titleText.fontStyle = TMPro.FontStyles.Bold;
                titleText.color = new Color(1f, 0.48f, 0.1f); // Orange
                titleText.text = title;
                titleText.enableWordWrapping = false;
                
                var titleFitter = titleGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter>();
                titleFitter.horizontalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.Unconstrained;
                titleFitter.verticalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;
                
                // Generate TOC entries
                BuildGuideTocEntries(tocGO.transform, sections, sourceText, 0);
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Error creating guide TOC: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Recursively build TOC entries for guide sections
        /// </summary>
        private static void BuildGuideTocEntries(Transform parent, List<OperationalDetail> sections, TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI sourceText, int depth)
        {
            foreach (var section in sections)
            {
                // Create entry
                var entryGO = new GameObject($"TOCEntry_{section.title}");
                entryGO.transform.SetParent(parent, false);
                
                var entryText = entryGO.AddComponent<TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI>();
                entryText.font = sourceText.font;
                entryText.fontSharedMaterial = sourceText.fontSharedMaterial;
                entryText.fontSize = sourceText.fontSize - 2;
                entryText.color = new Color(0f, 0.54f, 0.9f); // Blue link color
                
                string indent = new string(' ', depth * 4);
                string prefix = depth == 0 ? "" : "- ";
                entryText.text = $"{indent}{prefix}{section.title}";
                entryText.enableWordWrapping = false;
                
                var entryFitter = entryGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter>();
                entryFitter.horizontalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.Unconstrained;
                entryFitter.verticalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;
                
                // Make clickable if has tocId
                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(section.tocId))
                {
                    var button = entryGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.Button>();
                    button.transition = UnityEngine.UI.Selectable.Transition.ColorTint;
                    var colors = button.colors;
                    colors.highlightedColor = new Color(0f, 0.66f, 1f);
                    button.colors = colors;
                    
                    string tocId = section.tocId;
                    button.onClick.AddListener(() => TocLinkHandler.ScrollToSection(tocId));
                }
                
                // Recurse for children
                if (section.children != null && section.children.Count > 0)
                {
                    BuildGuideTocEntries(parent, section.children, sourceText, depth + 1);
                }
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Create a section for guides/mechanics (unified approach, no wrapper)
        /// </summary>
        private static void CreateGuideSection(RectTransform parent, OperationalDetail sectionDetail,
            StationpediaCategory categoryPrefab, TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI sourceText, UniversalPage page)
        {
            // Create collapsible section
            var sectionCategory = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(categoryPrefab, parent);
            sectionCategory.gameObject.name = $"Section_{sectionDetail.title}";

            // Set title
            string titleColor = "#FF7A18"; // Orange like vanilla guides
            sectionCategory.Title.text = $"<color={titleColor}>{sectionDetail.title}</color>";

            ApplyCustomCategoryIcons(sectionCategory);
            
            // Register for TOC navigation if has tocId
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(sectionDetail.tocId))
            {
                TocLinkHandler.RegisterSection(sectionDetail.tocId, sectionCategory.GetComponent<RectTransform>(), sectionCategory, null);
            }

            // Add description
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(sectionDetail.description))
            {
                CreateTextElement(sectionCategory.Contents, sourceText, sectionDetail.description);
            }

            // Add bullet items
            if (sectionDetail.items != null && sectionDetail.items.Count > 0)
            {
                var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder();
                foreach (var item in sectionDetail.items)
                {
                    sb.AppendLine($"  • {item}");
                }
                CreateTextElement(sectionCategory.Contents, sourceText, sb.ToString().TrimEnd());
            }

            // Add steps
            if (sectionDetail.steps != null && sectionDetail.steps.Count > 0)
            {
                var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder();
                int stepNum = 1;
                foreach (var step in sectionDetail.steps)
                {
                    sb.AppendLine($"  <color=#FFA500>{stepNum}.</color> {step}");
                    stepNum++;
                }
                CreateTextElement(sectionCategory.Contents, sourceText, sb.ToString().TrimEnd());
            }
            
            // Add image if present
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(sectionDetail.imageFile))
            {
                CreateInlineImage(sectionCategory.Contents, sectionDetail.imageFile);
            }
            
            // Add YouTube link if present
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(sectionDetail.youtubeUrl))
            {
                CreateYouTubeLink(sectionCategory.Contents, sourceText, sectionDetail.youtubeUrl, sectionDetail.youtubeLabel);
            }

            // Add nested children
            if (sectionDetail.children != null)
            {
                foreach (var child in sectionDetail.children)
                {
                    CreateGuideSection(sectionCategory.Contents, child, categoryPrefab, sourceText, page);
                }
            }

            // Default to collapsed
            sectionCategory.Contents.gameObject.SetActive(false);
            if (sectionCategory.CollapseImage != null && sectionCategory.NotVisibleImage != null)
            {
                sectionCategory.CollapseImage.sprite = sectionCategory.NotVisibleImage;
            }

            page.CreatedCategories.Add(sectionCategory);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Create a section in flat guide mode (no Operational Details wrapper) - LEGACY, use CreateGuideSection
        /// </summary>
        private static void CreateFlatGuideSection(RectTransform parent, OperationalDetail sectionDetail,
            StationpediaCategory categoryPrefab, TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI sourceText, UniversalPage page)
        {
            // Delegate to unified method
            CreateGuideSection(parent, sectionDetail, categoryPrefab, sourceText, page);
        }
```

        /// Render guide/mechanic sections directly - unified rendering for all guide types
        /// </summary>
        private static void RenderGuideSections(UniversalPage page, Transform contentTransform, DeviceDescriptions guideData, bool generateToc = false, string tocTitle = null)
        {
            try
            {
                var stationpedia = Stationpedia.Instance;
                if (stationpedia == null) return;

                var categoryPrefab = stationpedia.CategoryPrefab;
                if (categoryPrefab == null) return;

                var sourceText = page.PageDescription;
                if (sourceText == null) return;

                // Clear any existing content
                var existingContent = contentTransform.Find("GuideSectionsContent");
                if (existingContent != null)
                {
                    UnityEngine.Object.DestroyImmediate(existingFlat.gameObject);
                }

                // Create container
                var containerGO = new GameObject("FlatGuideContent");
                containerGO.transform.SetParent(contentTransform, false);
                containerGO.transform.SetSiblingIndex(20);

                var containerRT = containerGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
                containerRT.anchorMin = new Vector2(0, 1);
                containerRT.anchorMax = new Vector2(1, 1);
                containerRT.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 1);

                var containerLayout = containerGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.VerticalLayoutGroup>();
                containerLayout.spacing = 10;
                containerLayout.childForceExpandWidth = true;
                containerLayout.childForceExpandHeight = false;
                containerLayout.childControlWidth = true;
                containerLayout.childControlHeight = true;

                var containerFitter = containerGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter>();
                containerFitter.horizontalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.Unconstrained;
                containerFitter.verticalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;

                // Render each section directly as a collapsible category
                foreach (var sectionDetail in guideData.operationalDetails)
                {
                    CreateFlatGuideSection(containerRT, sectionDetail, categoryPrefab, sourceText, page);
                }

                // Force layout rebuild
                if (stationpedia.ContentRectTransform != null)
                {
                    UnityEngine.UI.LayoutRebuilder.ForceRebuildLayoutImmediate(stationpedia.ContentRectTransform);
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Error rendering flat guide: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        /// <summary>

            // Add bullet items

            {

                    sb.AppendLine($"  • {item}");
                }

            // Add steps

                {
                    sb.AppendLine($"  <color=#FFA500>{stepNum}.</color> {step}");

            page.CreatedCategories.Add(sectionCategory);
        }

<tool-use data-tool-type="generic" data-tool-name="replace_string_in_file"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **replace_string_in_file**</summary>
