- newString:

```
/**
 * StationpediaRenderer - Main renderer component
 * Takes a DeviceDocument and renders it as styled HTML matching in-game Stationpedia
 * Parses TMP to AST and renders all device fields
 * 
 * For GUIDES: Sections render directly without "Operational Details" wrapper
 * For DEVICES: Sections still render inside "Operational Details" for backward compat
 */

import React, { useMemo } from 'react';
import type { DeviceDocument, GuideDocument } from '@models/contentModel';
import { DeviceHeader } from './components/DeviceHeader';
import { RichTextRenderer } from './components/RichTextRenderer';
import { CollapsibleSection } from './components/CollapsibleSection';
import { TOCPanel } from './components/TOCPanel';
import { OperationalDetailSection } from './components/OperationalDetailSection';
import { LogicSection } from './components/LogicSection';

// CSS is loaded separately - import it in the app entry point if needed

interface StationpediaRendererProps {
  device: DeviceDocument | GuideDocument | null;
  onLinkClick?: (target: string) => void;
}

export const StationpediaRenderer: React.FC<StationpediaRendererProps> = ({
  device,
  onLinkClick,
}) => {
  // Handle null device - show placeholder
  if (!device) {
    return (
      <div className="stationpedia-renderer p-6 flex items-center justify-center h-full text-gray-500">
        <div className="text-center">
          <div className="text-4xl mb-4">📖</div>
          <div>Select a device to preview</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  // Handle markdown guides - render as plain text/markdown preview
  const isMarkdownContent = (device as any)._isMarkdown === true;
  
  // Detect if this is a guide (has guideKey) vs device (has deviceKey)
  const isGuide = !!(device as any).guideKey;
  
  // Get the key - either deviceKey or guideKey
  const itemKey = (device as any).deviceKey || (device as any).guideKey || 'Unknown';
  
  if (isMarkdownContent) {
    return (
      <div className="stationpedia-renderer p-6" data-testid="stationpedia-renderer">
        <DeviceHeader
          displayName={device.displayName}
          deviceKey={itemKey}
          titleColor="#ff6a00"
        />
        <div className="bg-stationpedia-panel border border-stationpedia-border rounded p-4 mt-4">
          <pre className="whitespace-pre-wrap text-white font-sans text-sm leading-relaxed">
            {device.pageDescription || '(No content)'}
          </pre>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  // Combine page description parts
  const fullPageDescription = useMemo(() => {
    const parts: string[] = [];

    if (device.pageDescriptionPrepend && typeof device.pageDescriptionPrepend === 'string') {
      parts.push(device.pageDescriptionPrepend);
    }

    if (device.pageDescription) {
      parts.push(device.pageDescription);
    }

    if (device.pageDescriptionAppend && typeof device.pageDescriptionAppend === 'string') {
      parts.push(device.pageDescriptionAppend);
    }

    return parts.join('\n\n');
  }, [device?.pageDescription, device?.pageDescriptionPrepend, device?.pageDescriptionAppend]);

  return (
    <div className="stationpedia-renderer p-6" data-testid="stationpedia-renderer">
      <DeviceHeader
        displayName={device.displayName}
        deviceKey={itemKey}
        titleColor={device.operationalDetailsTitleColor}
      />

      {/* TOC Panel - shown for both guides and devices when enabled */}
      {device.generateToc && device.operationalDetails && device.operationalDetails.length > 0 && (
        <TOCPanel
          operationalDetails={device.operationalDetails}
          title={device.tocTitle || 'Contents'}
          onItemClick={onLinkClick}
        />
      )}

      {/* Page Description - always shown if present */}
      {fullPageDescription && (
        <CollapsibleSection
          title="Description"
          defaultOpen={true}
          depth={0}
          backgroundColor={device.operationalDetailsBackgroundColor}
        >
          <div className="page-description">
            <RichTextRenderer
              content={fullPageDescription}
              onLinkClick={onLinkClick}
              className="text-sm text-gray-200"
            />
          </div>
        </CollapsibleSection>
      )}

      {/* GUIDES: Render sections directly without "Operational Details" wrapper */}
      {isGuide && device.operationalDetails && device.operationalDetails.length > 0 && (
        <div className="space-y-3 mt-3">
          {device.operationalDetails.map((detail, i) => (
            <OperationalDetailSection
              key={i}
              detail={detail}
              depth={0}
              onLinkClick={onLinkClick}
            />
          ))}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* DEVICES: Render sections inside "Operational Details" wrapper for backward compat */}
      {!isGuide && device.operationalDetails && device.operationalDetails.length > 0 && (
        <CollapsibleSection
          title="Operational Details"
          defaultOpen={true}
          depth={0}
          titleColor={device.operationalDetailsTitleColor}
          backgroundColor={device.operationalDetailsBackgroundColor}
        >
          <div className="space-y-2">
            {device.operationalDetails.map((detail, i) => (
              <OperationalDetailSection
                key={i}
                detail={detail}
                depth={0}
                onLinkClick={onLinkClick}
              />
            ))}
          </div>
        </CollapsibleSection>
      )}
```

- oldString:

```
/**
 * StationpediaRenderer - Main renderer component
 * Takes a DeviceDocument and renders it as styled HTML matching in-game Stationpedia
 * Parses TMP to AST and renders all device fields
 */

import React, { useMemo } from 'react';
import type { DeviceDocument, GuideDocument } from '@models/contentModel';
import { DeviceHeader } from './components/DeviceHeader';
import { RichTextRenderer } from './components/RichTextRenderer';
import { CollapsibleSection } from './components/CollapsibleSection';
import { TOCPanel } from './components/TOCPanel';
import { OperationalDetailSection } from './components/OperationalDetailSection';
import { LogicSection } from './components/LogicSection';

// CSS is loaded separately - import it in the app entry point if needed

interface StationpediaRendererProps {
  device: DeviceDocument | GuideDocument | null;
  onLinkClick?: (target: string) => void;
}

export const StationpediaRenderer: React.FC<StationpediaRendererProps> = ({
  device,
  onLinkClick,
}) => {
  // Handle null device - show placeholder
  if (!device) {
    return (
      <div className="stationpedia-renderer p-6 flex items-center justify-center h-full text-gray-500">
        <div className="text-center">
          <div className="text-4xl mb-4">📖</div>
          <div>Select a device to preview</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  // Handle markdown guides - render as plain text/markdown preview
  const isMarkdownContent = (device as any)._isMarkdown === true;
  
  // Get the key - either deviceKey or guideKey
  const itemKey = (device as any).deviceKey || (device as any).guideKey || 'Unknown';
  
  if (isMarkdownContent) {
    return (
      <div className="stationpedia-renderer p-6" data-testid="stationpedia-renderer">
        <DeviceHeader
          displayName={device.displayName}
          deviceKey={itemKey}
          titleColor="#ff6a00"
        />
        <div className="bg-stationpedia-panel border border-stationpedia-border rounded p-4 mt-4">
          <pre className="whitespace-pre-wrap text-white font-sans text-sm leading-relaxed">
            {device.pageDescription || '(No content)'}
          </pre>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  // Combine page description parts
  const fullPageDescription = useMemo(() => {
    const parts: string[] = [];

    if (device.pageDescriptionPrepend && typeof device.pageDescriptionPrepend === 'string') {
      parts.push(device.pageDescriptionPrepend);
    }

    if (device.pageDescription) {
      parts.push(device.pageDescription);
    }

    if (device.pageDescriptionAppend && typeof device.pageDescriptionAppend === 'string') {
      parts.push(device.pageDescriptionAppend);
    }

    return parts.join('\n\n');
  }, [device?.pageDescription, device?.pageDescriptionPrepend, device?.pageDescriptionAppend]);

  return (
    <div className="stationpedia-renderer p-6" data-testid="stationpedia-renderer">
      <DeviceHeader
        displayName={device.displayName}
        deviceKey={itemKey}
        titleColor={device.operationalDetailsTitleColor}
      />

      {device.generateToc && device.operationalDetails && device.operationalDetails.length > 0 && (
        <TOCPanel
          operationalDetails={device.operationalDetails}
          title={device.tocTitle || 'Table of Contents'}
          onItemClick={onLinkClick}
        />
      )}

      {fullPageDescription && (
        <CollapsibleSection
          title="Description"
          defaultOpen={true}
          depth={0}
          backgroundColor={device.operationalDetailsBackgroundColor}
        >
          <div className="page-description">
            <RichTextRenderer
              content={fullPageDescription}
              onLinkClick={onLinkClick}
              className="text-sm text-gray-200"
            />
          </div>
        </CollapsibleSection>
      )}

      {device.operationalDetails && device.operationalDetails.length > 0 && (
        <CollapsibleSection
          title="Operational Details"
          defaultOpen={true}
          depth={0}
          titleColor={device.operationalDetailsTitleColor}
          backgroundColor={device.operationalDetailsBackgroundColor}
        >
          <div className="space-y-2">
            {device.operationalDetails.map((detail, i) => (
              <OperationalDetailSection
                key={i}
                detail={detail}
                depth={0}
                onLinkClick={onLinkClick}
              />
            ))}
          </div>
        </CollapsibleSection>
      )}
```

                    className={`flex-1 px-2 py-1 rounded cursor-pointer text-sm ${

                        : 'hover:bg-stationpedia-accent/20'

                    Title: {device.tocTitle || 'Contents'}
                  </div>

              <div className="text-xs text-gray-400">
                <b>Sections</b> are collapsible categories. <b>Headers</b> are flat inline titles with text below.
              </div>
            </div>

- newString:

```
  // Handle tag types
  if (tagType === 'THING') {
    // {THING:DeviceKey} or {THING:DeviceKey;DisplayText}
    const parts = content.split(';');
    const target = parts[0];
    const displayText = parts[1] || target;
    const textNode = createTextNode(displayText);
    return createInternalLinkNode(target, [textNode], undefined, 'thing');
  } else if (tagType === 'LINK') {
    // {LINK:PageKey;DisplayText}
    const parts = content.split(';');
    const pageKey = parts[0];
    const displayText = parts[1] || pageKey;
    const textNode = createTextNode(displayText);
    return createInternalLinkNode(pageKey, [textNode], undefined, 'link');
  } else if (tagType === 'HEADER') {
    // {HEADER:HeaderText} - renders as bold orange text
    const headerText = content;
    const textNode = createTextNode(headerText);
    // Create bold node wrapped in orange color
    const boldNode = createBoldNode([textNode]);
    return createColorNode('#FF7A18', [boldNode]);
  }

  // Unknown special tag
  state.position = startPos;
  return null;
}
```

- oldString:

  // Handle tag types

    const displayText = parts[1] || pageKey;
    const textNode = createTextNode(displayText);
    return createInternalLinkNode(pageKey, [textNode], undefined, 'link');
  }

  // Unknown special tag
  state.position = startPos;
  return null;
}

_**Agent (copilot/claude-opus-4.5)**_

The user wants a major refactor to unify the editing/rendering system:

1. **Remove "Operational Details" wrapper** - No more wrapping everything in an "Operational Details" collapsible section
2. **Unified system** - Devices, guides, game mechanics, and manuals should all use the same editing/rendering approach
3. **Flexible schema** - Ability to create any number of sections with any titles
4. **Remove `flatStructure` binary** - No more flat=true/false distinction
5. **Preserve device appearance** - Devices that already have operational details should look the same but use the new unified system
6. **Add TOC support** - Guides and game mechanics editor should support Table of Contents
7. **Include manuals** - Don't forget manual support

This is a significant refactor. Let me think about the approach:

**Current state:**
- Devices have `operationalDetails` array that gets wrapped in "Operational Details" collapsible
- Guides have `operationalDetails` array that can be flat or wrapped based on `flatStructure`
- The editor simulator wraps in "Operational Details"
- The mod has `CreateOperationalDetailsCategory` which creates the wrapper

**New unified approach:**
- Everything uses a `sections` array (or keep `operationalDetails` name for backwards compat)
- Each section is a top-level collapsible category
- No wrapper - sections render directly
- For devices, we can auto-create a section called "Operational Details" that contains the existing content if desired, OR just render sections directly
- TOC support for all content types

Let me plan the changes:

### Mod changes (C#):
1. Remove `flatStructure` property from Models.cs
2. Update `RenderJsonGuidePage` to always render flat (no wrapper)
3. Update device rendering to optionally NOT wrap in "Operational Details" OR make "Operational Details" just another section
4. Actually, let's think about this more carefully...


For devices, I should keep "Operational Details" as a section for backward compatibility with existing content, but treat it as just another collapsible rather than a special wrapper. For guides, mechanics, and manuals, sections render directly without any wrapper. The TypeScript side needs updates to `StationpediaRenderer.tsx` to handle this distinction—devices can optionally preserve the wrapper appearance while guides render sections flat, and I need to add TOC support across the board.

The core implementation involves updating the C# models to remove or ignore `flatStructure`, modifying `RenderJsonGuidePage` to always render sections directly without wrapping, and keeping `CreateOperationalDetailsCategory` only for device backward compatibility. In the renderer, I'll detect content type and adjust accordingly. The editing UI should be unified across all content types with consistent TOC handling.

---

- newString:

```
        /// Render guide/mechanic sections directly - unified rendering for all guide types
        /// Uses the same rendering infrastructure as Operational Details but without the outer wrapper
        /// </summary>
        private static void RenderGuideSections(UniversalPage page, Transform contentTransform, DeviceDescriptions guideData, bool generateToc = false, string tocTitle = null)
        {
            try
            {
                // Clear TOC registry for new page
                TocLinkHandler.ClearRegistry();
                
                var stationpedia = Stationpedia.Instance;
                if (stationpedia == null) return;

                var categoryPrefab = stationpedia.CategoryPrefab;
                if (categoryPrefab == null) return;

                var sourceText = page.PageDescription;
                if (sourceText == null) return;

                // Clear any existing content
                var existingContent = contentTransform.Find("GuideSectionsContent");
                if (existingContent != null)
                {
                    UnityEngine.Object.DestroyImmediate(existingContent.gameObject);
                }

                // Create container (same as Operational Details uses)
                var containerGO = new GameObject("GuideSectionsContent");
                containerGO.transform.SetParent(contentTransform, false);
                containerGO.transform.SetSiblingIndex(20);

                var containerRT = containerGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
                containerRT.anchorMin = new Vector2(0, 1);
                containerRT.anchorMax = new Vector2(1, 1);
                containerRT.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 1);

                var containerLayout = containerGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.VerticalLayoutGroup>();
                containerLayout.spacing = 10;
                containerLayout.childForceExpandWidth = true;
                containerLayout.childForceExpandHeight = false;
                containerLayout.childControlWidth = true;
                containerLayout.childControlHeight = true;

                var containerFitter = containerGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter>();
                containerFitter.horizontalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.Unconstrained;
                containerFitter.verticalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;

                // Generate Table of Contents if enabled (using existing TOC infrastructure)
                if (generateToc && guideData.operationalDetails != null && guideData.operationalDetails.Count > 0)
                {
                    // Create a temporary category to hold the TOC (reusing existing TOC code)
                    CreateGuideTableOfContents(containerRT, sourceText, guideData);
                }

                // Render each top-level section using the SAME infrastructure as Operational Details
                // This gives us proper nested backgrounds, collapsibles, etc.
                foreach (var sectionDetail in guideData.operationalDetails)
                {
                    // Render at depth 0 since these are top-level sections (no outer wrapper)
                    RenderGuideSectionElement(containerRT, sourceText, sectionDetail, categoryPrefab, page, 0, null);
                }

                // Force layout rebuild
                if (stationpedia.ContentRectTransform != null)
                {
                    UnityEngine.UI.LayoutRebuilder.ForceRebuildLayoutImmediate(stationpedia.ContentRectTransform);
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Error rendering guide sections: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Render a single guide section element - uses same logic as RenderOperationalDetailElement
        /// </summary>
        private static void RenderGuideSectionElement(RectTransform parent, TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI sourceText,
            OperationalDetail detail, StationpediaCategory categoryPrefab, UniversalPage page, int depth, string parentTocId)
        {
            // All guide sections should be collapsible by default (like Operational Details behavior)
            // Unless explicitly marked as non-collapsible
            bool shouldBeCollapsible = detail.collapsible || !string.IsNullOrEmpty(detail.title);
            
            if (shouldBeCollapsible && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(detail.title))
            {
                // Create a nested collapsible category (reuses the existing infrastructure)
                CreateGuideCollapsibleSection(parent, sourceText, detail, categoryPrefab, page, depth, parentTocId);
            }
            else
            {
                // Create inline content (non-collapsible text/items)
                CreateGuideInlineContent(parent, sourceText, detail, categoryPrefab, page, depth, parentTocId);
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Create a collapsible guide section - mirrors CreateNestedCollapsibleCategory
        /// </summary>
        private static void CreateGuideCollapsibleSection(RectTransform parent, TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI sourceText,
            OperationalDetail detail, StationpediaCategory categoryPrefab, UniversalPage page, int depth, string parentTocId)
        {
            try
            {
                // Create nested category
                var nestedCategory = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate<StationpediaCategory>(categoryPrefab, parent);
                if (nestedCategory == null) return;
                
                string safeTocId = detail.tocId ?? detail.title?.Replace(" ", "_") ?? $"section_{depth}";
                nestedCategory.gameObject.name = $"GuideSection_{safeTocId}";
                
                // Set title with depth-based coloring (uses VanillaModeManager for proper colors)
                string titleColor = VanillaModeManager.GetTitleColor(depth);
                nestedCategory.Title.text = $"<color={titleColor}>{detail.title}</color>";
                
                // Apply custom icons (respects vanilla mode)
                ApplyCustomCategoryIcons(nestedCategory);
                
                // Configure layout with proper backgrounds (respects vanilla mode)
                ConfigureNestedCategoryLayout(nestedCategory, detail, depth);
                
                // Register for TOC navigation
                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(detail.tocId))
                {
                    TocLinkHandler.RegisterSection(detail.tocId, nestedCategory.GetComponent<RectTransform>(), nestedCategory, parentTocId);
                }
                
                // Add image if specified
                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(detail.imageFile))
                {
                    CreateInlineImage(nestedCategory.Contents, detail.imageFile);
                }
                
                // Add description text
                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(detail.description))
                {
                    CreateTextElement(nestedCategory.Contents, sourceText, detail.description);
                }
                
                // Add bullet items
                if (detail.items != null && detail.items.Count > 0)
                {
                    var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder();
                    foreach (var item in detail.items)
                    {
                        sb.AppendLine($"  • {item}");
                    }
                    CreateTextElement(nestedCategory.Contents, sourceText, sb.ToString().TrimEnd());
                }
                
                // Add numbered steps
                if (detail.steps != null && detail.steps.Count > 0)
                {
                    var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder();
                    int stepNum = 1;
                    string stepColor = VanillaModeManager.IsVanillaMode ? "#FFFFFF" : "#FFA500";
                    foreach (var step in detail.steps)
                    {
                        sb.AppendLine($"  <color={stepColor}>{stepNum}.</color> {step}");
                        stepNum++;
                    }
                    CreateTextElement(nestedCategory.Contents, sourceText, sb.ToString().TrimEnd());
                }
                
                // Add YouTube link if specified
                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(detail.youtubeUrl))
                {
                    CreateYouTubeLink(nestedCategory.Contents, sourceText, detail.youtubeUrl, detail.youtubeLabel);
                }
                
                // Add inline video if specified
                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(detail.videoFile))
                {
                    CreateInlineVideo(nestedCategory.Contents, detail.videoFile);
                }
                
                // Recursively render children
                if (detail.children != null)
                {
                    foreach (var child in detail.children)
                    {
                        RenderGuideSectionElement(nestedCategory.Contents, sourceText, child, categoryPrefab, page, depth + 1, detail.tocId);
                    }
                }
                
                // Default to collapsed
                nestedCategory.Contents.gameObject.SetActive(false);
                if (nestedCategory.CollapseImage != null && nestedCategory.NotVisibleImage != null)
                {
                    nestedCategory.CollapseImage.sprite = nestedCategory.NotVisibleImage;
                }
                
                // Update animator state
                var animator = nestedCategory.GetComponent<IconAnimator>();
                if (animator != null)
                {
                    animator.Initialize(false);
                }
                
                page.CreatedCategories.Add(nestedCategory);
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Error creating guide section: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Create inline content for non-collapsible guide sections
        /// </summary>
        private static void CreateGuideInlineContent(RectTransform parent, TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI sourceText,
            OperationalDetail detail, StationpediaCategory categoryPrefab, UniversalPage page, int depth, string parentTocId)
        {
            // Create container for inline content
            var containerGO = new GameObject($"InlineContent_{detail.title ?? "text"}");
            containerGO.transform.SetParent(parent, false);
            
            var containerRT = containerGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            containerRT.anchorMin = new Vector2(0, 1);
            containerRT.anchorMax = new Vector2(1, 1);
            containerRT.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 1);
            
            var containerLayout = containerGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.VerticalLayoutGroup>();
            containerLayout.childForceExpandWidth = true;
            containerLayout.childForceExpandHeight = false;
            containerLayout.childControlWidth = true;
            containerLayout.childControlHeight = true;
            containerLayout.spacing = 5;
            
            var containerFitter = containerGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter>();
            containerFitter.horizontalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.Unconstrained;
            containerFitter.verticalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;
            
            // Add title if present (as styled header text)
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(detail.title))
            {
                string titleColor = VanillaModeManager.GetTitleColor(depth);
                CreateTextElement(containerRT, sourceText, $"<b><color={titleColor}>{detail.title}</color></b>");
            }
            
            // Add description
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(detail.description))
            {
                CreateTextElement(containerRT, sourceText, detail.description);
            }
            
            // Add bullet items
            if (detail.items != null && detail.items.Count > 0)
            {
                var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder();
                foreach (var item in detail.items)
                {
                    sb.AppendLine($"  • {item}");
                }
                CreateTextElement(containerRT, sourceText, sb.ToString().TrimEnd());
            }
            
            // Add numbered steps
            if (detail.steps != null && detail.steps.Count > 0)
            {
                var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder();
                int stepNum = 1;
                string stepColor = VanillaModeManager.IsVanillaMode ? "#FFFFFF" : "#FFA500";
                foreach (var step in detail.steps)
                {
                    sb.AppendLine($"  <color={stepColor}>{stepNum}.</color> {step}");
                    stepNum++;
                }
                CreateTextElement(containerRT, sourceText, sb.ToString().TrimEnd());
            }
            
            // Render children
            if (detail.children != null)
            {
                foreach (var child in detail.children)
                {
                    RenderGuideSectionElement(containerRT, sourceText, child, categoryPrefab, page, depth + 1, detail.tocId);
                }
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Create Table of Contents for guide (uses existing TOC infrastructure)
        /// </summary>
        private static void CreateGuideTableOfContents(RectTransform parent, TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI sourceText, DeviceDescriptions guideData)
```

- oldString:

        /// Render guide/mechanic sections directly - unified rendering for all guide types
        /// </summary>
        private static void RenderGuideSections(UniversalPage page, Transform contentTransform, DeviceDescriptions guideData, bool generateToc = false, string tocTitle = null)
        {
            try
            {
                var stationpedia = Stationpedia.Instance;
                if (stationpedia == null) return;

                var categoryPrefab = stationpedia.CategoryPrefab;
                if (categoryPrefab == null) return;

                var sourceText = page.PageDescription;
                if (sourceText == null) return;

                // Clear any existing content
                var existingContent = contentTransform.Find("GuideSectionsContent");
                if (existingContent != null)
                {
                    UnityEngine.Object.DestroyImmediate(existingContent.gameObject);
                }

                // Create container
                var containerGO = new GameObject("GuideSectionsContent");
                containerGO.transform.SetParent(contentTransform, false);
                containerGO.transform.SetSiblingIndex(20);

                var containerRT = containerGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
                containerRT.anchorMin = new Vector2(0, 1);
                containerRT.anchorMax = new Vector2(1, 1);
                containerRT.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 1);

                var containerLayout = containerGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.VerticalLayoutGroup>();
                containerLayout.spacing = 10;
                containerLayout.childForceExpandWidth = true;
                containerLayout.childForceExpandHeight = false;
                containerLayout.childControlWidth = true;
                containerLayout.childControlHeight = true;

                var containerFitter = containerGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter>();
                containerFitter.horizontalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.Unconstrained;
                containerFitter.verticalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;

                // Generate Table of Contents if enabled
                if (generateToc && guideData.operationalDetails != null && guideData.operationalDetails.Count > 0)
                {
                    CreateGuideToc(containerRT, guideData.operationalDetails, sourceText, tocTitle ?? "Contents");
                }

                // Render each section directly as a collapsible category
                foreach (var sectionDetail in guideData.operationalDetails)
                {
                    CreateGuideSection(containerRT, sectionDetail, categoryPrefab, sourceText, page);
                }

                // Force layout rebuild
                if (stationpedia.ContentRectTransform != null)
                {
                    UnityEngine.UI.LayoutRebuilder.ForceRebuildLayoutImmediate(stationpedia.ContentRectTransform);
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Error rendering guide sections: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Create a Table of Contents panel for guide sections
        /// </summary>
        private static void CreateGuideToc(RectTransform parent, List<OperationalDetail> sections, TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI sourceText, string title)
        {
            try
            {
                // Create TOC container
                var tocGO = new GameObject("GuideTOC");
                tocGO.transform.SetParent(parent, false);
                
                var tocRT = tocGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
                tocRT.anchorMin = new Vector2(0, 1);
                tocRT.anchorMax = new Vector2(1, 1);
                tocRT.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 1);
                
                // Background
                var tocBg = tocGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.Image>();
                tocBg.color = new Color(0.05f, 0.1f, 0.15f, 0.8f);
                
                // Layout
                var tocLayout = tocGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.VerticalLayoutGroup>();
                tocLayout.padding = new RectOffset(10, 10, 10, 10);
                tocLayout.spacing = 5;
                tocLayout.childForceExpandWidth = true;
                tocLayout.childForceExpandHeight = false;
                tocLayout.childControlWidth = true;
                tocLayout.childControlHeight = true;
                
                var tocFitter = tocGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter>();
                tocFitter.horizontalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.Unconstrained;
                tocFitter.verticalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;
                
                // Title
                var titleGO = new GameObject("TOCTitle");
                titleGO.transform.SetParent(tocGO.transform, false);
                
                var titleText = titleGO.AddComponent<TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI>();
                titleText.font = sourceText.font;
                titleText.fontSharedMaterial = sourceText.fontSharedMaterial;
                titleText.fontSize = sourceText.fontSize + 2;
                titleText.fontStyle = TMPro.FontStyles.Bold;
                titleText.color = new Color(1f, 0.48f, 0.1f); // Orange
                titleText.text = title;
                titleText.enableWordWrapping = false;
                
                var titleFitter = titleGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter>();
                titleFitter.horizontalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.Unconstrained;
                titleFitter.verticalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;
                
                // Generate TOC entries
                BuildGuideTocEntries(tocGO.transform, sections, sourceText, 0);
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Error creating guide TOC: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Recursively build TOC entries for guide sections
        /// </summary>
        private static void BuildGuideTocEntries(Transform parent, List<OperationalDetail> sections, TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI sourceText, int depth)
        {
            foreach (var section in sections)
            {
                // Create entry
                var entryGO = new GameObject($"TOCEntry_{section.title}");
                entryGO.transform.SetParent(parent, false);
                
                var entryText = entryGO.AddComponent<TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI>();
                entryText.font = sourceText.font;
                entryText.fontSharedMaterial = sourceText.fontSharedMaterial;
                entryText.fontSize = sourceText.fontSize - 2;
                entryText.color = new Color(0f, 0.54f, 0.9f); // Blue link color
                
                string indent = new string(' ', depth * 4);
                string prefix = depth == 0 ? "" : "- ";
                entryText.text = $"{indent}{prefix}{section.title}";
                entryText.enableWordWrapping = false;
                
                var entryFitter = entryGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter>();
                entryFitter.horizontalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.Unconstrained;
                entryFitter.verticalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;
                
                // Make clickable if has tocId
                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(section.tocId))
                {
                    var button = entryGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.Button>();
                    button.transition = UnityEngine.UI.Selectable.Transition.ColorTint;
                    var colors = button.colors;
                    colors.highlightedColor = new Color(0f, 0.66f, 1f);
                    button.colors = colors;
                    
                    string tocId = section.tocId;
                    button.onClick.AddListener(() => TocLinkHandler.ScrollToSectionStatic(tocId));
                }
                
                // Recurse for children
                if (section.children != null && section.children.Count > 0)
                {
                    BuildGuideTocEntries(parent, section.children, sourceText, depth + 1);
                }
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Create a section for guides/mechanics (unified approach, no wrapper)
        /// </summary>
        private static void CreateGuideSection(RectTransform parent, OperationalDetail sectionDetail,
            StationpediaCategory categoryPrefab, TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI sourceText, UniversalPage page)
        {
            // Create collapsible section
            var sectionCategory = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(categoryPrefab, parent);
            sectionCategory.gameObject.name = $"Section_{sectionDetail.title}";

            // Set title
            string titleColor = "#FF7A18"; // Orange like vanilla guides
            sectionCategory.Title.text = $"<color={titleColor}>{sectionDetail.title}</color>";

            ApplyCustomCategoryIcons(sectionCategory);
            
            // Register for TOC navigation if has tocId
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(sectionDetail.tocId))
            {
                TocLinkHandler.RegisterSection(sectionDetail.tocId, sectionCategory.GetComponent<RectTransform>(), sectionCategory, null);
            }

            // Add description
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(sectionDetail.description))
            {
                CreateTextElement(sectionCategory.Contents, sourceText, sectionDetail.description);
            }
```


</details></tool-use>

        /// <summary>
        /// Create Table of Contents for guide (uses existing TOC infrastructure)
        /// </summary>
        private static void CreateGuideTableOfContents(RectTransform parent, TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI sourceText, DeviceDescriptions guideData)
        {
            try
            {
                // Use the existing CreateTableOfContents infrastructure by creating a temporary wrapper
                // This gives us proper styling that matches device TOCs
                var stationpedia = Stationpedia.Instance;
                if (stationpedia == null) return;
                
                var categoryPrefab = stationpedia.CategoryPrefab;
                if (categoryPrefab == null) return;
                
                // Create a wrapper category that holds just the TOC (will be non-collapsible)
                var tocCategory = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate<StationpediaCategory>(categoryPrefab, parent);
                if (tocCategory == null) return;
                
                tocCategory.gameObject.name = "GuideTOC";
                
                // Make the TOC header visible but simple
                string titleColor = VanillaModeManager.IsVanillaMode ? "#FFFFFF" : "#FF7A18";
                tocCategory.Title.text = $"<color={titleColor}>{guideData.tocTitle ?? "Contents"}</color>";
                
                ApplyCustomCategoryIcons(tocCategory);
                ConfigureTocCategoryLayout(tocCategory);
                
                // Build the TOC content using existing method patterns
                BuildTocContent(tocCategory.Contents, guideData.operationalDetails, sourceText, 0);
                
                // Keep TOC collapsed by default
                tocCategory.Contents.gameObject.SetActive(false);
                if (tocCategory.CollapseImage != null && tocCategory.NotVisibleImage != null)
                {
                    tocCategory.CollapseImage.sprite = tocCategory.NotVisibleImage;
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Error creating guide TOC: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Configure layout for TOC category
        /// </summary>
        private static void ConfigureTocCategoryLayout(StationpediaCategory category)
        {
            // Remove GridLayoutGroup if present
            var existingGridLayout = category.Contents.GetComponent<UnityEngine.UI.GridLayoutGroup>();
            if (existingGridLayout != null)
            {
                UnityEngine.Object.DestroyImmediate(existingGridLayout);
            }
            
            // Add background
            var bgImage = category.Contents.gameObject.GetComponent<UnityEngine.UI.Image>();
            if (bgImage == null)
            {
                bgImage = category.Contents.gameObject.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.Image>();
            }
            
            if (VanillaModeManager.IsVanillaMode)
            {
                if (_nativePanelSprite != null)
                {
                    bgImage.sprite = _nativePanelSprite;
                    bgImage.type = _nativePanelType;
                    bgImage.material = _nativePanelMaterial;
                }
                bgImage.color = Color.white;
            }
            else
            {
                var windowSprite = StationpediaAscendedMod.GetWindowBackgroundSprite();
                if (windowSprite != null)
                {
                    bgImage.sprite = windowSprite;
                    bgImage.type = UnityEngine.UI.Image.Type.Sliced;
                    bgImage.material = null;
                }
                bgImage.color = new Color(0.05f, 0.1f, 0.2f, 0.9f);
            }
            
            // Add layout group
            var layout = category.Contents.GetComponent<UnityEngine.UI.VerticalLayoutGroup>();
            if (layout == null)
            {
                layout = category.Contents.gameObject.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.VerticalLayoutGroup>();
            }
            layout.childForceExpandWidth = true;
            layout.childForceExpandHeight = false;
            layout.childControlWidth = true;
            layout.childControlHeight = true;
            layout.spacing = 3;
            layout.padding = new RectOffset(10, 10, 8, 8);
            
            // Add ContentSizeFitter
            var fitter = category.Contents.GetComponent<UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter>();
            if (fitter == null)
            {
                fitter = category.Contents.gameObject.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter>();
            }
            fitter.verticalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;
            fitter.horizontalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.Unconstrained;
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Build TOC content entries
        /// </summary>
        private static void BuildTocContent(RectTransform parent, List<OperationalDetail> sections, TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI sourceText, int depth)
        {
            foreach (var section in sections)
            {
                // Create entry
                var entryGO = new GameObject($"TOCEntry_{section.title}");
                entryGO.transform.SetParent(parent, false);
                
                var entryText = entryGO.AddComponent<TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI>();
                entryText.font = sourceText.font;
                entryText.fontSharedMaterial = sourceText.fontSharedMaterial;
                entryText.fontSize = sourceText.fontSize - 2;
                entryText.color = VanillaModeManager.IsVanillaMode 
                    ? new Color(0f, 0.54f, 0.9f)  // Blue
                    : new Color(1f, 0.48f, 0.1f); // Orange
                
                string indent = new string(' ', depth * 4);
                string prefix = depth == 0 ? "" : "- ";
                entryText.text = $"{indent}{prefix}{section.title}";
                entryText.enableWordWrapping = false;
                
                var entryFitter = entryGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter>();
                entryFitter.horizontalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.Unconstrained;
                entryFitter.verticalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;
                
                // Make clickable if has tocId
                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(section.tocId))
                {
                    var button = entryGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.Button>();
                    button.transition = UnityEngine.UI.Selectable.Transition.ColorTint;
                    var colors = button.colors;
                    colors.highlightedColor = new Color(0f, 0.66f, 1f);
                    button.colors = colors;
                    
                    string tocId = section.tocId;
                    button.onClick.AddListener(() => TocLinkHandler.ScrollToSectionStatic(tocId));
                }
                
                // Recurse for children
                if (section.children != null && section.children.Count > 0)
                {
                    BuildTocContent(parent, section.children, sourceText, depth + 1);
                }
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Create a Part section (Part 1/2/3) with its own TOC box and nested sections
        /// </summary>
        private static void CreateSurvivalManualPart(RectTransform parent, OperationalDetail partDetail, 
            StationpediaCategory categoryPrefab, TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI sourceText, UniversalPage page)

        /// <summary>
        /// Create Table of Contents for guide (uses existing TOC infrastructure)
        /// </summary>
        private static void CreateGuideTableOfContents(RectTransform parent, TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI sourceText, DeviceDescriptions guideData)

            // Add bullet items
            if (sectionDetail.items != null && sectionDetail.items.Count > 0)
            {
                var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder();
                foreach (var item in sectionDetail.items)
                {
                    sb.AppendLine($"  • {item}");
                }
                CreateTextElement(sectionCategory.Contents, sourceText, sb.ToString().TrimEnd());
            }

            // Add steps
            if (sectionDetail.steps != null && sectionDetail.steps.Count > 0)
            {
                var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder();
                int stepNum = 1;
                foreach (var step in sectionDetail.steps)
                {
                    sb.AppendLine($"  <color=#FFA500>{stepNum}.</color> {step}");
                    stepNum++;
                }
                CreateTextElement(sectionCategory.Contents, sourceText, sb.ToString().TrimEnd());
            }
            
            // Add image if present
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(sectionDetail.imageFile))
            {
                CreateInlineImage(sectionCategory.Contents, sectionDetail.imageFile);
            }
            
            // Add YouTube link if present
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(sectionDetail.youtubeUrl))
            {
                CreateYouTubeLink(sectionCategory.Contents, sourceText, sectionDetail.youtubeUrl, sectionDetail.youtubeLabel);
            }

            // Add nested children
            if (sectionDetail.children != null)
            {
                foreach (var child in sectionDetail.children)
                {
                    CreateGuideSection(sectionCategory.Contents, child, categoryPrefab, sourceText, page);
                }
            }

            // Default to collapsed
            sectionCategory.Contents.gameObject.SetActive(false);
            if (sectionCategory.CollapseImage != null && sectionCategory.NotVisibleImage != null)
            {
                sectionCategory.CollapseImage.sprite = sectionCategory.NotVisibleImage;
            }

            page.CreatedCategories.Add(sectionCategory);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Create a section in flat guide mode (no Operational Details wrapper) - LEGACY, use CreateGuideSection
        /// </summary>
        private static void CreateFlatGuideSection(RectTransform parent, OperationalDetail sectionDetail,
            StationpediaCategory categoryPrefab, TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI sourceText, UniversalPage page)
        {
            // Delegate to unified method
            CreateGuideSection(parent, sectionDetail, categoryPrefab, sourceText, page);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Create a Part section (Part 1/2/3) with its own TOC box and nested sections
        /// </summary>
        private static void CreateSurvivalManualPart(RectTransform parent, OperationalDetail partDetail, 
            StationpediaCategory categoryPrefab, TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI sourceText, UniversalPage page)

The issue is that my changes made guides render "flat" without the proper styling that the Operational Details section has. The user wants:
- The same visual styling as Operational Details (nested backgrounds, proper formatting)
- But without the limitation of having to wrap everything in an "Operational Details" top-level section

So the fix is:
1. Keep using the proper `CreateOperationalDetailsSection` rendering for nested sections
2. But don't wrap guides in an outer "Operational Details" category

- The Air Conditioning Guide looks broken because it's a GUIDE that now uses my new `RenderGuideSections` which doesn't have the proper styling

1. For guides, render each top-level section as a collapsible category (like the existing code did)
2. Use the same nested rendering that `CreateOperationalDetailsCategory` uses internally
3. Just skip the outer "Operational Details" wrapper

- newString:

```
        /// <summary>
        /// Postfix patch for SetPageGuides - modifies button layout to two columns
        /// </summary>
        public static void Stationpedia_SetPageGuides_Postfix(Stationpedia __instance)
        {
            try
            {
                // Create buttons for all JSON-defined guides (handles duplication check internally)
                CreateJsonGuideButtons(__instance);
                
                // Add the "Vanilla Guides" text header above vanilla guides
                AddVanillaGuidesHeader(__instance);
                
                // Modify layout to two columns
                HomePageLayoutManager.ModifyGuideLoreLayout(__instance.LoreGuideContents);
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Error modifying guide layout: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }
```

- oldString:

```
        // Track if guides page has been initialized to prevent duplicates
        private static bool _guidesPageInitialized = false;
        private static HashSet<string> _createdGuideButtons = new HashSet<string>();

        /// <summary>
        /// Postfix patch for SetPageGuides - modifies button layout to two columns
        /// </summary>
        public static void Stationpedia_SetPageGuides_Postfix(Stationpedia __instance)
        {
            try
            {
                // Check if we need to reinitialize (page was cleared)
                bool needsInit = !_guidesPageInitialized || _createdGuideButtons.Count == 0;
                
                // Also check if our custom buttons still exist in the hierarchy
                if (!needsInit && __instance.LoreGuideContents != null)
                {
                    bool foundCustomButton = false;
                    foreach (Transform child in __instance.LoreGuideContents)
                    {
                        if (child.gameObject.name.StartsWith("CustomGuide_") || 
                            child.gameObject.name == "VanillaGuidesHeader")
                        {
                            foundCustomButton = true;
                            break;
                        }
                    }
                    if (!foundCustomButton)
                    {
                        needsInit = true;
                        _createdGuideButtons.Clear();
                    }
                }
                
                if (!needsInit)
                {
                    // Already initialized, just refresh layout
                    HomePageLayoutManager.ModifyGuideLoreLayout(__instance.LoreGuideContents);
                    return;
                }
                
                // Create buttons for all JSON-defined guides
                CreateJsonGuideButtons(__instance);
                
                // Add the "Vanilla Guides" text header and arrange vanilla guides below it
                AddVanillaGuidesHeader(__instance);
                
                // Modify layout to two columns
                HomePageLayoutManager.ModifyGuideLoreLayout(__instance.LoreGuideContents);
                
                _guidesPageInitialized = true;
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Error modifying guide layout: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }
```


</details></tool-use>

        /// <summary>
        /// Create buttons for all guides defined in descriptions.json
        /// </summary>
        private static void CreateJsonGuideButtons(Stationpedia stationpedia)
        {
            try
            {
                var guides = Data.JsonGuideLoader.GetAllGuides();
                if (guides == null || guides.Count == 0)
                {
                    return;
                }

                // Register guide pages first
                Data.JsonGuideLoader.RegisterGuidePages();

                int createdCount = 0;
                foreach (var guide in guides)
                {
                    // Skip SurvivalManual - it has its own dedicated button on the home page
                    if (guide.guideKey == "SurvivalManual")
                        continue;
                    
                    // Check if button already exists in the hierarchy (more robust than static HashSet)
                    string buttonName = $"CustomGuide_{guide.guideKey}";
                    bool exists = false;
                    foreach (Transform child in stationpedia.LoreGuideContents)
                    {
                        if (child.gameObject.name == buttonName)
                        {
                            exists = true;
                            break;
                        }
                    }
                    
                    if (exists)
                        continue;
                        
                    CreateGuideButton(stationpedia, guide);
                    createdCount++;
                }

                if (createdCount > 0)
                {
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Created {createdCount} JSON guide buttons");
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
```

- oldString:

```
        /// <summary>
        /// Create buttons for all guides defined in descriptions.json
        /// </summary>
        private static void CreateJsonGuideButtons(Stationpedia stationpedia)
        {
            try
            {
                var guides = Data.JsonGuideLoader.GetAllGuides();
                if (guides == null || guides.Count == 0)
                {
                    return;
                }

                // Register guide pages first
                Data.JsonGuideLoader.RegisterGuidePages();

                int createdCount = 0;
                foreach (var guide in guides)
                {
                    // Skip if already created
                    if (_createdGuideButtons.Contains(guide.guideKey))
                        continue;
                    
                    // Skip SurvivalManual - it has its own dedicated button on the home page
                    // and should NOT appear in the Guides list
                    if (guide.guideKey == "SurvivalManual")
                        continue;
                        
                    CreateGuideButton(stationpedia, guide);
                    _createdGuideButtons.Add(guide.guideKey);
                    createdCount++;
                }

                if (createdCount > 0)
                {
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Created {createdCount} JSON guide buttons");
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
```

_**Agent (copilot/claude-opus-4.5)**_

The user has three issues to fix:

1. Add ability to add an image at the top of the guide (like vanilla guides do)
2. Description append and prepend text doesn't show on guides
3. Inline header still has a dropdown - it should just be a header with flat text underneath, no collapsible behavior

Let me investigate each of these:

1. For guide images - I need to look at what vanilla guides do and add support for a top image
2. For description append/prepend - I need to check how guides are rendered and make sure we're including these
3. For inline headers - I need to look at the logic that decides when something is collapsible vs inline

_**Agent (copilot/claude-opus-4.5)**_

Looking at the screenshot, I can see:
1. "Test Of In Line Headers" - orange text, no nesting (correct - this is an inline header)
2. "Test of new section" - bold white text, no nesting (this should probably be nested/collapsible)
3. "Test Of Inline Header" - bold white text, no nesting (correct - this is an inline header)

The issue is that I changed the logic to `bool shouldBeCollapsible = detail.collapsible;` which means ONLY sections with `collapsible: true` explicitly set will be collapsible.

But the user wants:
- Sections with `collapsible: true` → nested/collapsible (dropdown)
- Sections with `collapsible: false` (or not set, defaulting to false) AND have a title → inline header (no dropdown, just styled title + flat text)
- The default behavior for sections WITH a title should still be collapsible

So the correct logic should be:
- If `collapsible` is explicitly set to `false`, render as inline
- If `collapsible` is `true` OR if it's not explicitly set (and has a title), render as collapsible

The problem is that `collapsible` defaults to `false` in the model. So I need a way to distinguish between "explicitly set to false" and "not set (defaulting to false)".

Looking at the OperationalDetail model:
```csharp
public bool collapsible { get; set; } = false;
```

This defaults to false. So when JSON doesn't specify it, it's false. When JSON specifies `"collapsible": false`, it's also false. There's no way to distinguish.

The user's intent seems to be:
- By default, sections with titles should be collapsible (nested with dropdown)
- Only when `collapsible: false` is explicitly set should it be an inline header

But with the current model, we can't tell the difference between "not specified" and "explicitly false".


I need to either change the default behavior back to making sections with titles collapsible, or introduce a new property like `inlineHeader: true` or make `collapsible` nullable to distinguish between unset and explicitly false. The old code made everything with a title collapsible regardless of the `collapsible` setting, while the new code only respects the explicit true value.

Looking at what the user actually needs: sections should be collapsible by default when they have a title, but `collapsible: false` should force an inline header instead. The challenge is distinguishing between "not specified" and "explicitly set to false." The cleanest approach is to set `collapsible` to default to `true` in the model itself, so unspecified values automatically become collapsible, explicit true stays collapsible, and explicit false renders inline. I should update the model's default value.

```
/**
 * ImagePickerModal - Modal to browse and select PNG images from extracted assets
 */
import React, { useState, useEffect, useMemo } from 'react';

interface ImageInfo {
  filename: string;
  path: string;
}

interface ImagePickerModalProps {
  isOpen: boolean;
  onClose: () => void;
  onSelectImage: (filename: string) => void;
  currentValue?: string;
}

export const ImagePickerModal: React.FC<ImagePickerModalProps> = ({
  isOpen,
  onClose,
  onSelectImage,
  currentValue,
}) => {
  const [images, setImages] = useState<ImageInfo[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [searchFilter, setSearchFilter] = useState('');
  const [selectedImage, setSelectedImage] = useState<string | null>(currentValue || null);
  const [previewImage, setPreviewImage] = useState<string | null>(null);

  // Load images when modal opens
  useEffect(() => {
    if (isOpen) {
      loadImages();
      setSelectedImage(currentValue || null);
    }
  }, [isOpen, currentValue]);

  const loadImages = async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    setError(null);
    try {
      // Use the Electron API to scan the Texture2D folder
      const result = await window.electronAPI?.scanImageFolder?.();
      if (result?.images) {
        setImages(result.images);
      } else {
        // Fallback: try to load from a known location
        setError('Could not load images. Make sure the AssetRipperFiles folder exists.');
      }
    } catch (err) {
      setError(`Failed to load images: ${err}`);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  // Filter images based on search
  const filteredImages = useMemo(() => {
    if (!searchFilter.trim()) return images;
    const filter = searchFilter.toLowerCase();
    return images.filter(img => img.filename.toLowerCase().includes(filter));
  }, [images, searchFilter]);

  // Handle image selection
  const handleSelect = () => {
    if (selectedImage) {
      onSelectImage(selectedImage);
      onClose();
    }
  };

  // Handle double-click to select immediately
  const handleDoubleClick = (filename: string) => {
    onSelectImage(filename);
    onClose();
  };

  if (!isOpen) return null;

  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/70">
      <div className="bg-stationpedia-panel border border-stationpedia-border rounded-lg shadow-xl w-[900px] max-h-[80vh] flex flex-col">
        {/* Header */}
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-stationpedia-border">
          <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-stationpedia-accent">🖼️ Select Page Image</h2>
          <button
            onClick={onClose}
            className="text-gray-400 hover:text-white text-xl"
          >
            ✕
          </button>
        </div>

        {/* Search Bar */}
        <div className="p-4 border-b border-stationpedia-border">
          <input
            type="text"
            value={searchFilter}
            onChange={(e) => setSearchFilter(e.target.value)}
            placeholder="Search images by name..."
            className="w-full px-3 py-2 bg-stationpedia-surface border border-stationpedia-border rounded text-white placeholder-gray-500 focus:outline-none focus:border-stationpedia-accent"
            autoFocus
          />
          <div className="mt-2 text-xs text-gray-400">
            {filteredImages.length} images found {searchFilter && `(filtered from ${images.length})`}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Content */}
        <div className="flex-1 overflow-hidden flex">
          {/* Image Grid */}
          <div className="flex-1 overflow-auto p-4">
            {loading ? (
              <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-full text-gray-400">
                Loading images...
              </div>
            ) : error ? (
              <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-red-400">
                <div className="mb-2">⚠️ {error}</div>
                <button
                  onClick={loadImages}
                  className="px-3 py-1 bg-stationpedia-accent hover:bg-stationpedia-accent-hover text-white rounded text-sm"
                >
                  Retry
                </button>
              </div>
            ) : filteredImages.length === 0 ? (
              <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-full text-gray-400">
                No images found matching "{searchFilter}"
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div className="grid grid-cols-4 gap-3">
                {filteredImages.map((img) => (
                  <div
                    key={img.filename}
                    onClick={() => setSelectedImage(img.filename)}
                    onDoubleClick={() => handleDoubleClick(img.filename)}
                    onMouseEnter={() => setPreviewImage(img.path)}
                    onMouseLeave={() => setPreviewImage(null)}
                    className={`relative p-2 rounded cursor-pointer border-2 transition-all ${
                      selectedImage === img.filename
                        ? 'border-stationpedia-accent bg-stationpedia-accent/20'
                        : 'border-transparent bg-stationpedia-surface hover:border-stationpedia-border'
                    }`}
                    title={img.filename}
                  >
                    {/* Thumbnail placeholder - actual image loading would need file:// protocol */}
                    <div className="aspect-square bg-gray-800 rounded flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden">
                      <img
                        src={`file://${img.path}`}
                        alt={img.filename}
                        className="max-w-full max-h-full object-contain"
                        onError={(e) => {
                          // Replace with placeholder on error
                          (e.target as HTMLImageElement).style.display = 'none';
                        }}
                      />
                      <span className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center text-3xl opacity-30">
                        🖼️
                      </span>
                    </div>
                    {/* Filename */}
                    <div className="mt-1 text-xs text-gray-300 truncate text-center">
                      {img.filename.replace('.png', '')}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>

          {/* Preview Panel */}
          <div className="w-64 border-l border-stationpedia-border p-4 flex flex-col">
            <div className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-300 mb-2">Preview</div>
            <div className="flex-1 bg-gray-800 rounded flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden">
              {previewImage || selectedImage ? (
                <img
                  src={`file://${previewImage || images.find(i => i.filename === selectedImage)?.path || ''}`}
                  alt="Preview"
                  className="max-w-full max-h-full object-contain"
                  onError={(e) => {
                    (e.target as HTMLImageElement).style.display = 'none';
                  }}
                />
              ) : (
                <span className="text-gray-500 text-sm">Hover over an image to preview</span>
              )}
            </div>
            {selectedImage && (
              <div className="mt-2 text-xs text-gray-400 break-all">
                Selected: {selectedImage}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Footer */}
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-t border-stationpedia-border">
          <div className="text-xs text-gray-400">
            Double-click to select, or select and click "Use Selected"
          </div>
          <div className="flex gap-2">
            <button
              onClick={onClose}
              className="px-4 py-2 bg-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-600 text-white rounded"
            >
              Cancel
            </button>
            <button
              onClick={handleSelect}
              disabled={!selectedImage}
              className="px-4 py-2 bg-stationpedia-accent hover:bg-stationpedia-accent-hover text-white rounded disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"
            >
              Use Selected
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default ImagePickerModal;

```

- newString:

```
// Update simulator with devices
ipcMain.on('editor:devices-updated', (event, devices: any[]) => {
  setSimulatorWindowDevices(devices);
});

// Scan image folder for PNG files
ipcMain.handle('fs:scanImageFolder', async (_, baseFolder?: string) => {
  try {
    // Default to the AssetRipperFiles Texture2D folder relative to workspace
    // The workspace path should be passed, or we scan a known location
    const possiblePaths = [
      // Relative to workspace (passed in)
      baseFolder ? path.join(baseFolder, '..', 'AssetRipperFiles', 'ExportedProject', 'Assets', 'Texture2D') : null,
      // Common dev path
      'C:\\Dev\\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\\AssetRipperFiles\\ExportedProject\\Assets\\Texture2D',
    ].filter(Boolean) as string[];

    let texturePath: string | null = null;
    for (const p of possiblePaths) {
      if (fs.existsSync(p)) {
        texturePath = p;
        break;
      }
    }

    if (!texturePath) {
      return { success: false, error: 'Could not find Texture2D folder' };
    }

    const images: { filename: string; path: string }[] = [];
    const entries = fs.readdirSync(texturePath, { withFileTypes: true });
    
    for (const entry of entries) {
      if (entry.isFile() && entry.name.toLowerCase().endsWith('.png')) {
        images.push({
          filename: entry.name,
          path: path.join(texturePath, entry.name),
        });
      }
    }

    // Sort alphabetically
    images.sort((a, b) => a.filename.localeCompare(b.filename));

    return { success: true, images, folder: texturePath };
  } catch (error: any) {
    return { success: false, error: error.message };
  }
});
```

// Expose file system API
contextBridge.exposeInMainWorld('electronAPI', {
  // Dialog
  openFolder: () => ipcRenderer.invoke('dialog:openFolder'),

  // File system
  readFile: (filePath: string) => ipcRenderer.invoke('fs:readFile', filePath),
  writeFile: (filePath: string, content: string, createBackup: boolean = true) =>
    ipcRenderer.invoke('fs:writeFile', filePath, content, createBackup),
  listFiles: (directory: string, extensions: string[] = []) =>
    ipcRenderer.invoke('fs:listFiles', directory, extensions),
  exists: (filePath: string) => ipcRenderer.invoke('fs:exists', filePath),
  stat: (filePath: string) => ipcRenderer.invoke('fs:stat', filePath),
  scanImageFolder: (baseFolder?: string) => ipcRenderer.invoke('fs:scanImageFolder', baseFolder),

  // Settings
  getSettings: () => ipcRenderer.invoke('settings:get'),
  setSettings: (settings: object) => ipcRenderer.invoke('settings:set', settings),

  // Simulator
  openSimulator: () => ipcRenderer.invoke('simulator:open'),
  sendDevicesToSimulator: (devices: any[]) => ipcRenderer.send('editor:devices-updated', devices),
});
```

- oldString:

/**
 * DeviceSectionsEditor - Unified editor for ALL device sections
 * Shows all editable parts of a device: description, operational details, logic, modes, etc.
 * Top: Rich text editor for currently selected field (resizable)
 * Bottom: Tree view of all sections with click-to-select (resizable)
 */

export const DeviceSectionsEditor: React.FC<DeviceSectionsEditorProps> = ({
  device,
  onUpdateDevice,
}) => {
  const { workspace } = useEditorStore();
  const [selection, setSelection] = useState<SelectionType>(null);
  const [isLinkModalOpen, setIsLinkModalOpen] = useState(false);
  const [isImagePickerOpen, setIsImagePickerOpen] = useState(false);
  const [expandedSections, setExpandedSections] = useState<Record<string, boolean>>({
    description: true,
    operationalDetails: true,
    logic: false,
    modes: false,
    slots: false,
    connections: false,
  });
  const [editorHeight, setEditorHeight] = useState(200); // Resizable editor height
  const editorRef = useRef<HTMLTextAreaElement>(null);
```

  const [isLinkModalOpen, setIsLinkModalOpen] = useState(false);

    operationalDetails: true,
    logic: false,
    modes: false,
    slots: false,
    connections: false,
  });

                string pageKey = page.Key;

Ah, I understand now! The issue is that when the user views a guide page, the prepend/append text is being applied, and then when they navigate to OTHER pages (not just the guide), that prepend/append text persists on those other pages too.

This sounds like a state persistence issue - the prepend/append text is being added to the page description but not being reset when navigating to a different page.

Let me look at the code flow to understand how this happens:

1. User opens a guide page
2. RenderGuideSections adds prepend/append text to the page description
3. User navigates to another page
4. The page description still has the old prepend/append text

The issue is likely that the page description text isn't being reset when navigating between pages, OR the prepend/append is being applied in a way that accumulates.

Let me look at the RenderGuideSections function to see how it handles prepend/append for guides:

<tool-use data-tool-type="generic" data-tool-name="replace_string_in_file"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **replace_string_in_file**</summary>
